programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: An owner puts his badly behaved cat in kitty jail, and a problem feline leaves bowel movements and shredded furniture in its wake

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: A cat that has undergone a transplant operation becomes aggressive, and a feline appears unhappy when its owners boyfriend moves in to the house

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Wild weather hits Texas, and Eddins is the first responder to a downed power line with active wires. Richards attempts to serve an arrest warrant

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet

programme.desc: Jeff and his team head to a remote town where they encounter an unexpected animal. In Denver, Dr Amy treats a kitten with a mysterious injury

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete Nelson is asked to build a brewery in the sky on a familys property, so he crafts a barn-themed tavern in some trees that is accessible by a rope

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Jimmy books a gator wrestling show and takes the best volunteers along with him. Later, Paul is left to rely on the most annoying member of the group

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: The Kilchers tackle their biggest challenge yet, and singer Jewel returns to the homestead with her son Kase. Meanwhile, Jane tries to land the largest fish she has ever hooked

programme.title: Edge of Alaska
programme.desc: Jeremy gets his farmstead up and running, but unfinished business gets in the way. Plus, bears pose a threat to Jenny and her newborn baby while stranded on an island in a storm

programme.title: Alaska Monsters
programme.sub-title: Bigfoot of the Arctic Circle: Siberian Giant
programme.desc: The outdoorsmen head to Coldfoot, Alaska, to hunt down the Siberian Giant, a Yeti reportedly responsible for the massacre of nine hikers in Russia

programme.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The Raneys set out to help Oregon homesteaders living at the bottom of a 100ft cliff, separating them from the four acres of land they need for food and livestock

programme.title: Dog Detectives
programme.desc: In Merseyside PC Bartley and his dog Chico are involved in a high-speed car chase. Meanwhile, new explosives detection dog Pip is on duty at Aston Villas football ground

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete Nelson and his crew build a luxury treetop bolthole for the winner of the Ultimate Treehouse Giveaway

programme.title: Animal Cops Phoenix
programme.desc: Tempers fray as Mark meets aggressive dogs and home-owners to educate them about a new law making it illegal to keep a dog on a chain when temperatures hit over 100 degrees

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Assistant Chief investigator Charles Jantzen tries to save 70 cats and dogs from a run-down private animal rescue centre

programme.title: Inside Porton Down: Britains Secret Weapons Research Facility
programme.desc: Dr Michael Mosley investigates Britains most secretive and controversial military research base, Porton Down, in a programme originally shown on its 100th anniversary in 2016. He learns about chemical and biological weapons old and new, reveals the truth about animal and human testing, and discovers how the latest science and technology are helping to defend the UK against terrorist attacks and rogue nations

programme.title: Genius of the Ancient World
programme.desc: Bettany Hughes series exploring the lives and teachings of influential ancient philosophers draws to a close with a profile of Confucius, who is credited as the first Chinese thinker to take a systematic philosophical approach to issues of social, political and ethical importance. Born during the chaotic Spring and Autumn period of Chinese history, Confucius believed that harmony could be promoted and achieved through the examples of sage rulers. He was also a innovative teacher, and tried to instill his principles of moral excellence in Chinas elite, but died without seeing his vision for his nation come to pass. However, his philosophies would eventually form the bedrock of Chinese culture, with many of his principles of tradition surviving to this day

programme.title: Lost Cities of the Ancients
programme.sub-title: The Cursed Valley of the Pyramids
programme.desc: The Peruvian Lambayeque civilisation, which based its culture on a strong belief that building pyramids was essential to its survival - as was human sacrifice. Archaeologists in northern Peru found mass graves near the lost city of Tucume, revealing a bloody secret. Narrated by Mark Halliley

programme.title: University Challenge
programme.desc: In the third of the academic quizs first-round matches, four students from the London School of Economics pit their wits against a team from University College, Oxford in a bid to reach the second stage of the competition. Jeremy Paxman asks the questions

programme.title: Only Connect
programme.desc: Victoria Coren Mitchell presents a quiz show of patience and lateral thinking, where successful contestants make connections between things which at first do not appear to be linked. This episode, its a battle of the scribes with the Travel Writers taking on the Science Writers

programme.title: Inside Porton Down: Britains Secret Weapons Research Facility
programme.desc: Dr Michael Mosley investigates Britains most secretive and controversial military research base, Porton Down, in a programme originally shown on its 100th anniversary in 2016. He learns about chemical and biological weapons old and new, reveals the truth about animal and human testing, and discovers how the latest science and technology are helping to defend the UK against terrorist attacks and rogue nations

programme.title: The Ruth Ellis Files: A Very British Crime Story
programme.desc: In July 1955, Ruth Ellis was the last woman to be hanged in Britain for the cold-blooded murder of lover David Blakely. Gillian Pachter takes a forensic look at the police investigation, and soon discovers worrying assumptions and problematic omissions

programme.title: Stephen Poliakoff Remembers - Caught on a Train
programme.desc: Screenwriter Stephen Poliakoff shares his memories of the BBCs 1980 television drama Caught On A Train - his BAFTA award-winning collaboration with late producer Kenith Trodd. He reveals how the production came together; why he was left thinking the drama may herald the end of his career, and which iconic James Bond villainess was almost cast as the leading lady

programme.title: Caught on a Train
programme.desc: A businessman working for a publishing company finds himself travelling on a night train through Germany where he sits next to a beautiful American girl and an old Viennese lady. Stephen Poliakoffs drama, starring Peggy Ashcroft, Michael Kitchen, Wendy Raebeck and Michael Sheard. First broadcast in 1980

programme.title: How to Get Ahead
programme.desc: The three-part documentary continues as writer and broadcaster Stephen Smith explores Renaissance Florence under the reign of Grand Duke Cosimo Medici, whose fledgling court prized the finer things in life. Successful courtiers had to have brains as well as brawn, and some looked to theorists like Niccolo Machiavelli for underhand ways to get ahead, while enlightened polymaths turned their minds to the heavens - and to ice-cream

programme.title: Scotlands Finest - The Story of the Highland Games
programme.desc: Bill Paterson narrates a documentary exploring the history and characters at the heart of the tests of strength and speed that constitute the Highland Games, beginning in the Fife village of Ceres, which is said to host Scotlands oldest tournament. The film examines how the tradition started as shows of strength and stamina between warring clans, but was changed into a pageant of tartan by Queen Victoria, and is carried on by Scottish communities around the world

programme.title: The Ruth Ellis Files: A Very British Crime Story
programme.desc: In July 1955, Ruth Ellis was the last woman to be hanged in Britain for the cold-blooded murder of lover David Blakely. Gillian Pachter takes a forensic look at the police investigation, and soon discovers worrying assumptions and problematic omissions

programme.title: University Challenge
programme.desc: In the third of the academic quizs first-round matches, four students from Coventry University pit their wits against a team from Cardiff University in a bid to reach the second stage of the competition. Jeremy Paxman asks the questions

programme.title: Only Connect
programme.desc: Victoria Coren Mitchell presents a quiz show of patience and lateral thinking, where successful contestants make connections between things which at first do not appear to be linked. This episode, two teams of puzzle fanatics do battle, with the Edinburgh Scrabblers taking on the Solent Scrabblers

programme.title: Dam Busters Declassified
programme.desc: Actor Martin Shaw takes to the skies in a bid to separate the facts from the myths surrounding the famous 1943 raid by 617 Squadron, which used bouncing bombs to attack German dams. He also talks to the last living RAFT veteran of the mission, as well as to a survivor of the flooding caused by the breaching of the Moehne dam, and meets the secret wartime girlfriend of pilot Guy Gibson

programme.title: The Great Escaper (2023)
programme.desc: Former Royal Navy officer Bernie Jordan is happily settled with wife Rene at a care home. Unfortunately, he hasnt secured a place on the official British Royal Legion trip to France to the commemorate the 70th anniversary of the D-Day landings. Bernie needs to make the trip to Normandy for personal reasons, and with Renes blessing, he sneaks off to pay his respects. Drama, starring Michael Caine and Glenda Jackson in her final film

programme.title: Talking Pictures
programme.desc: Celia Imrie tells the story of Glenda Jackson, one of Britains greatest acting talents and a double Oscar-winner, who famously turned her back on her screen career to pursue a life in politics. Including interviews and rarely seen moments from the BBC archive, the programme explores Jacksons career, providing an insight into the choices and aspirations that drove her over the years

programme.title: The Silence of the Lambs (1991)
programme.desc: Trainee FBI agent Clarice Starling is sent to interview an imprisoned psychopath with a taste for eating his victims. The inmate offers to help catch a serial killer who is holding a politicians daughter hostage - but to learn what he knows, Clarice has to engage in his dangerous mind games. Jonathan Demmes Oscar-winning thriller, based on Thomas Harriss novel, starring Jodie Foster, Anthony Hopkins, Scott Glenn and Ted Levine

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on 8 October 1999. Featuring S Club 7, Pet Shop Boys, Macy Gray, Melanie C, Liam Gallagher and Steve Craddock, Eurythmics, Gabrielle and Eiffel 65

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Jayne Middlemiss presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on 15 October 1999. Featuring Eurythmics, Jordan Knight, Macy Gray, The Charlatans, Ann Lee, George Michael, James and Christina Aguilera

programme.title: Talking Pictures
programme.desc: A look back at the career of the Oscar-winning actor through interviews conducted with the BBC. Hopkins talks about his approach to acting, his years as a hellraiser, and the films that helped make him a star, including Remains of the Day, Shadowlands, Nixon, and The Silence of the Lambs, in which he first portrayed his most celebrated character, Dr Hannibal Lecter. Sylvia Syms narrates

programme.title: Talking Pictures
programme.desc: Celia Imrie tells the story of Glenda Jackson, one of Britains greatest acting talents and a double Oscar-winner, who famously turned her back on her screen career to pursue a life in politics. Including interviews and rarely seen moments from the BBC archive, the programme explores Jacksons career, providing an insight into the choices and aspirations that drove her over the years

programme.title: How to Get Ahead

Successful courtiers had to have brains as well as brawn, and some looked to theorists like Niccolo Machiavelli for underhand ways to get ahead, while enlightened polymaths turned their minds to the heavens - and to ice-cream

programme.desc: A look ahead to the latest forecast

programme.desc: The latest national and international stories as they break

programme.title: Rip Off Britain
programme.desc: Gloria Hunniford, Julia Somerville and Louise Minchin investigate fake MOTs, hearing from the woman whose second-hand car was far from roadworthy. Theres also advice for the man who paid more than £200 for Christmas gift cards, only to find most of them had already been redeemed

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Tommy Walsh heads to in Rugeley, Staffordshire, to see a three-bedroom mid-terrace bought by a trio of experienced developers. Martin Roberts is in Cudham in the south-east London Borough of Bromley visiting a two-bedroom end-terrace cottage bought by a mother to help get her daughter on the property ladder. Jacqui Joseph is in north-west London to see two flats that may be better reverting back to one

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Students Amy and Laura take on lecturers Karen and Nick at an antiques fair in Wetherby, West Yorkshire, with experts Philip Serrell and Jonathan Pratt on hand to offer support. Caroline Hawley presents, and also shows fairgoers a horsehair-stuffed mystery item

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Scam Interceptors
programme.desc: The team track a technical support fraudster working out of New Delhi as he tries to steal money from a man in the UK. As he remotely accesses the victims computer, the team desperately try to get him on the phone -- but its easier said than done. Theres also a chat with a scammer who poses as former Friends actress Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Attenborough and the Sea Dragon
programme.desc: The naturalist joins a team of scientists examining the 200 million-year-old fossilised remains of an ichthyosaur, a vast sea creature which was discovered on Dorsets Jurassic Coast. As the skeleton is reassembled, advanced imaging technology and computer animation is used to create a simulation of the sea creature as it would have appeared when it was still alive - the most detailed reconstruction of its kind ever attempted. Meanwhile, forensic investigators painstakingly examine the bones to solve the mystery of how the ichthyosaur died

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Briony May Williams helps a family with six Irish wolfhounds find a new home in Suffolk with more room for the dogs. The presenter also takes a tour around a bespoke wooden yacht

programme.title: Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Friends Jordan, Allan, Archie and Lewis compete for cash by crossing a bridge of stepping stones across the studio floor. Quiz show, hosted by Ross Kemp

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Angela Scanlon for the quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for a cash prize

programme.title: BBC News at Six; Weather

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: JB Gill and Alex Jones host the magazine show, with celebrity guests and stories of interest from around the UK

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Walford is rife with gossip as Beas anonymous video of Elaine gains traction online. Ian instantly regrets his actions, Grant steps in to help a friend, while Gina and Harry are forced to come clean

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: The combined skills of woodworker Will Kirk and saddler Suzie Fletcher revive a cherished rocking horse that was built 55 years ago, while Pete Woods sets to work stripping back and respraying a spectacular set of conga drums. Paintings restorer Lucia Scalisi has the delicate task of restoring a badly damaged portrait of a womans grandmother and a logbook that played a key role in British LGBTQ+ history is given a new lease of life by bookbinder Chris Shaw

programme.title: Amandaland
programme.desc: The return of the Motherland spin-off, starring Lucy Punch and Joanna Lumley. Amanda meets Mals ex Abs for the first time and then discovers that Abs found her shallow - so she decides to use a school careers talk to prove her wrong. Philippa Dunne, Samuel Anderson and Siobhán McSweeney also star

programme.title: Only Child
programme.desc: After his dream job in Norway doesnt go quite to plan, Richard just wants to hide away from the world. Sadly for him, Ken has other ideas and forces him to join a protest group that is fighting to save the local allotments. Return of the comedy, starring Gregor Fisher and Greg McHugh

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: A round-up of todays headlines

programme.title: MOTD: UEFA Champions League
programme.desc: Action from the semi-final second-leg ties, featuring Arsenal v Atletico Madrid at Emirates Stadium and Bayern Munich v Paris Saint-Germain at Allianz Arena. Arsenal and Atletico continued their bids to win this competition for the first time, and six-time champions Bayern hosted the holders

programme.title: Celebrity Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp presents the high stakes celebrity quiz. Comedian and actor Phil Wang, dating expert Anna Williamson, actor and comedian Miles Jupp, and actor Jamie-Lee ODonnell must cross the Bridge by stepping on the truths and avoiding the lies, earning money for the charity of their choice with each correct answer

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Weekday magazine show featuring a mixture of topical discussion and expert advice for viewers

programme.title: Rip Off Britain
programme.sub-title: Insurer Wont Help as Our Home Falls Apart
programme.desc: Gloria Hunniford, Louise Minchin and Julia Somerville meet the couple who have been stuck in a battle with their insurer for more than three years over fixing damage to their home caused by subsidence. Plus, the renters waiting for faster broadband because their landlords wont approve the upgrade

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts is in Folkestone, Kent, to visit a two-bedroom maisonette taken on by a builder with an interesting hobby. Tommy Walsh is in Norwich to see a grade II listing with bags of charm and potential, while Dion Dublin is in Wigan, Greater Manchester, to see a three-bedroom terrace riddled with damp but with great development potential

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Danny Sebastian views hundreds of items that once belonged to Arthur Askey, and learns about the actor and comedians glittering career, while Roo Irvine and Caroline Hawley usher the teams round Newark antiques fair

programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Scam Interceptors
programme.desc: A woman in Essex falls victim to a devious scammer who is posing as the payment provider PayPal and all attempts to contact her fail, so the only option is to send in ground interceptors Harriet and Meea to end the scam face to face

programme.title: Attenborough and the Mammoth Graveyard
programme.desc: David Attenborough joins a team of archaeologists and palaeontologists excavating a mammoth graveyard discovered by fossil hunters in the prehistoric riverbed of the Thames. The site has also led to the discovery of stone artefacts, providing an insight into the relationship between early humans and mammoths during the Ice Ages. Leading experts in the fields of evolution provide their insight into this unique vision of prehistoric Britain

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson meets house-hunters who want to raise their children near the sea, so he takes them to view a selection of homes in Devon and Dorset. Away from search, Jules takes to a three-wheeled bicycle as he joins a scheme that helps people to get out and about on the areas beautiful coastline

programme.title: Celebrity Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp presents a special edition of the high stakes quiz, with pop stars playing to win money for their chosen charities. Pussycat Doll Kimberly Wyatt, Claire Richards from Steps, Eternals Kelle Bryan, and Sugababe Amelle Berrabah must cross the Bridge by stepping on the truth steps and avoiding the lies, earning money for each correct answer

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Angela Scanlon for the quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for a cash prize

programme.title: BBC News at Six; Weather
programme.desc: The latest headlines

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and Roman Kemp present the live magazine show featuring a mixture of celebrity chat and stories of interest

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: It is election day, and Ian and Elaine anxiously await the results, while Max and Cindy celebrate their joint birthday party in Harrys Barn, but tensions grow between him and Linda

programme.title: Race Across the World
programme.desc: With the leaderboard closer than ever, the pairs leave Zaamin National Park and race towards the next checkpoint - Kazakhstans largest city, Almaty. The Soviet-era capital is the countrys cultural and financial hub, and to get there, the teams face the choice between two countries - north into Kazakhstan, travelling between major cities, or into Kyrgyzstan, a country rarely visited by western tourists, with remote valleys, alpine lakes and winding mountain roads

programme.title: MasterChef
programme.desc: Anna Haugh and Grace Dent present the third quarter-final. The hopefuls begin with an invention test in which they must come up with a brunch dish of their own choosing, making the most of the fresh produce on offer. Then Jimi Famurewa arrives to set them a brief, asking for a dish that uses a nut or nuts of their choice

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: A round-up of todays headlines

programme.title: The View
programme.desc: Mark Carruthers presents a review of the weeks political news, including reports on the latest events at Stormont and Westminster. Plus, comment and analysis with studio guests

programme.title: Elections 2026
programme.desc: Laura Kuenssberg presents through-the-night results coverage following the elections across England, Scotland and Wales. Reeta Chakrabarti will crunch the numbers and Professor Sir John Curtice, political scientist and professor of politics at the University of Strathclyde, will be on hand to offer his voting knowledge and insight. BBC regional political editors will be at the most important counts, and representatives of the main parties will give their reaction to the emerging political landscape

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rapper Lady Leshurr, author Philippa Perry, broadcaster Alan Titchmarsh and comedian Mike Wozniak join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As usual, the participants set out to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible fibs about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory

programme.title: Blankety Blank
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts the comedy quiz show in which a panel of six celebrities fill in the missing blanks and help win some brilliant prizes for some very lucky contestants. This week, he is joined by Joe Marler, Sue Perkins, Trevor Nelson, Josh Pugh, Tasha Ghouri and Sara Barron

programme.title: Paddy and Molly: Show No Mersey
programme.desc: Molly wins her fight and comes back to Liverpool to see Paddy, who also receives more concerning news about his shoulder injury which could stop his next fight

programme.title: Paddy and Molly: Show No Mersey
programme.desc: Mixed martial artist Paddy The Daddy Pimblett tries to find out if having a baby is as tough as fight camp by getting wired up to a contraction machine. Later, big news from his medical team changes everything

programme.title: The Green Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough presents a guide to the lives of plants in environments around the world, beginning with the plant battlegrounds of the tropical rainforests. New filming techniques allow viewers to enter the plants world and see it from their perspective, and on their timescale. Featuring fast-growing trees, flowers that mimic dead animals, and life and death battles to absorb much-needed sunlight

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a look into the lives of mammals, exploring how they have adapted to their changing surroundings and have found ways to create homes in the wild. The first episode focuses on animals that thrive in the dark, from leopards that use night vision to hunt their prey to bats using echolocation to navigate the night skies

programme.title: The Catch Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the days news

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve takes a special journey to meet the most trafficked animal on earth - the pangolin. He meets the people working tirelessly to save them

programme.title: Match of the Day Live
programme.sub-title: Brighton and Hove Albion v Arsenal
programme.desc: Brighton and Hove Albion v Arsenal (Kick-off 7.45pm). All the action from the match at Broadfield Stadium. Arsenal are competing for a place in the top two and claimed a 1-0 win in the reverse fixture, with an own goal from the unfortunate Marisa Olislagers separating the sides. However, Brighton have impressed at times this season and are aiming to finish in the top half of the table

programme.title: Point Break (1991)
programme.desc: An FBI agent infiltrates a Californian surfing gang suspected of carrying out a series of armed robberies wearing masks modelled on former US presidents. However, his loyalties are tested to the limits when he is befriended by the gangs leader. Kathryn Bigelows thriller, starring Keanu Reeves, Patrick Swayze, Gary Busey and Lori Petty

programme.title: Paddy and Molly: Show No Mersey
programme.desc: Molly tries to make weight for her fight and avoid penalties, and her mum comes to Vegas for an emotional heart-to-heart. Paddy and friends cheer Molly on from home in Liverpool

programme.title: Better Date than Never
programme.desc: Liv hits the beach for her first ever date, while Charles goes sailing. Dianne meets her first match, and Olivias date makes a bold proposition

programme.title: Paddy and Molly: Show No Mersey
programme.desc: Paddy Pimblett and Molly McCann, MMA fighters from Liverpool, reflect on the last few months and all their triumphs. Molly and Ellis visit a fertility clinic, and Paddy tries DIY for the first time as the babies are about to arrive

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates this documentary following a chimpanzee troop in Senegal. As the dry season sets in, the alpha of the pack, who has ruled unchallenged for the past three years, faces a series of challenges and finds little support from the other apes

programme.title: Dynasties
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates as a mother puma battels her rivals and tackles her pray, almost three times her size. She must also also endure the wild mountain weather of Patagonia in order to raise her four cubs, which is her biggest litter to date

programme.title: The Catch Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the days news

programme.title: Asia
programme.desc: David Attenborough introduces the wildlife of Asias mountains, from elephants living in high altitude tea plantations, to gathering of swifts in Thailands mountainous caves. In Pakistan, markhor fight for mates atop towering cliffs, and in Nepal, the forested foothills of the Himalayas provide hiding places for one of Asias shyest mammals, the red panda

programme.title: Freddie Flintoffs Field of Dreams
programme.desc: As the team struggle to adapt to their new surroundings, Freddie encourages them to embrace the local Indian culture and cuisine. The team rally around Adnan as he struggles with life on tour and their first training session reveals a promising new addition to the squad who could give the team a fighting chance of securing their first victory in India

programme.title: The Traitors India
programme.desc: The traitors receive a daring secret mission to be executed in plain sight - and if they are not careful, it could blow their cover as the players head into a desolate no mans land to build the prize pot. Presented by Karan Johar

programme.title: The Traitors India
programme.desc: The game gets tougher as the latest mission forces the players to second-guess their most trusted allies, and as the day unfolds the innocents are left grappling with new theories and suspicions. As a result, new accusations fly at the Circle of Shaq, and old doubts resurface as the players try to uncover who can be trusted. And later, the traitors face a tough choice in the secret tower

programme.title: The Traitors India
programme.desc: Four people wake up with targets on their backs, fated to be murdered by the end of the day - and the players can save only one. In the mission, the players have to get into the minds of the traitors to answer challenging questions, and later, a long-doubted contestant is dragged back into the spotlight at the Circle of Shaq

programme.title: Smoggie Queens
programme.desc: Middlesbrough Pride finds Mam hosting the main stage and booking a Girls Aloud drag tribute act. the event promises to be a banger Comedy, written by and starring Phil Dunning, with Steph McGovern as herself. alongside Mark Benton, Alexandra Mardell, Michelle Visage, Patsy Lowe and Elijah Young

programme.title: We Built a Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary following 19-year-old TikTok star Kyle Thomas as he attempts to build a zoo for exotic species and separate himself from past controversy with animal rights activists. He enlists the help of farmer and builder Phil Hughes and together the pair plan on turning Phils modest petting farm into a world-class sanctuary for unwanted exotic animals

programme.title: Better Date than Never
programme.desc: Olivia invites her date to meet the family, and Liv shares a passionate moment on the harbour. Dianne ends her first date on a high

programme.title: Leigh-Anne: Race, Pop and Power
programme.desc: Documentary following pop star Leigh-Anne Pinnock as she confronts her experience as the only black member of Little Mix, and as a black woman in the music industry

programme.title: Paranormal: Britains Last Witch
programme.desc: Sian Eleri recounts the story of Helen Duncan, who claimed she could summon the dead. Helen was a Scottish medium, who in 1944 went on trail at the Old Bailey and became the last person convicted and imprisoned under the Witchcraft Act. Sian visits Helens birthplace, Callander, a small town where her childhood premonitions caused fear in the community

programme.title: Freddie Flintoffs Field of Dreams

programme.title: Barra on the Foyle

programme.desc: A look at travel in the deaf community, with tips for deaf travellers, solo adventures around the world and stories of confidence, independence and discovery. Presenter Ahmed Mudawi is joined in the studio by stand-up comedian and keen traveller Leah Francisco. Having travelled widely across Europe and Central America, Leah shares how taking the leap to explore the world helped her regain confidence and embrace new experiences

programme.title: MasterChef
programme.desc: Amateur cooks including a dairy manufacturer, a medical writer and a maths student enter the kitchen to battle for one of four MasterChef aprons. They begin by producing their signature dish, before following a recipe for a fish finger open sandwich, served with tartare sauce and pickle slaw - the catch being parts of the recipe are missing. Finally, the pick of the crop cook for three diners who know a thing or two about MasterChef - previous winners Chariya Khattiyot and Steven Wallis, and former finalist Omar Foster. Presented by Grace Dent and Anna Haugh

programme.title: See Hear
programme.desc: A look at love and relationships in the deaf community, from a couple married for over 50 years to honest conversations about modern dating and finding connection today. Presenter Rolf Choutan is joined by award-winning photographer Becky Bailey. Together, they discuss relationships, communication and how connection evolves over time

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: Sarahs slip of the tongue on Alicia Byrds podcast means that shes now gone viral as the wooden condoms girl, so the oversight team decides it would be good if she does a live interview. programme.title: Great Korean Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Travelling by rail across South Korea, Michael Portillo explores one of the worlds most successful modern nations, shaped by division, resilience and rapid change. They visit Fernhill Garden in Ballynahinch, Co Down, which is filled with more than 4,000 plants, before heading to Co Antrim for a suburban garden in Jordanstown and a six-acre farmhouse garden near Crumlin

Here, the squad visits south Wales, coming to the rescue of a busy entrepreneur who has no time to fix! her house. They must organise her messy living room into a space that the whole family can use and where she can run her business effectively, while also cleaning and organising months of clutter and grime. Presented by Asher Edwards, Maxine Dwyer and Tommy Walsh

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: After a huge wildfire Gordon Buchanan and Vianet Djenguet follow the lion prides dominant males Big Toe and Madumo as they reinstate their burnt-out boundaries and fight with intruder males. Brad Bestelink tracks Xudum the leopardess as she learns to hunt from trees after the fire wipes out her cover, while Anna Dimitriadis sticks with hungry resident cheetah Pobe day and night as she tries to hunt

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visits Stroud, where discoveries include a beaker made by craftsman and interior designer CR Ashbee which is decorated with a design reflecting his name. They also unearth a 17th-century cushion, while Simon Bull finds a rare marine chronometer in its original box, and Michael Aspel is intimidated by a headhunters sword from Borneo

programme.desc: Antique experts James Lewis and Catherine Southon search for items to take off to auction at Dover Castle in Kent. James unearths a silver owl inkwell and Catherine discovers an alabaster bust. Presenter Paul Martin delves into the history of the English Channel

programme.title: Iolos River Valleys
programme.desc: Iolo journeys through south Wales to explore the River Usk. His 77-mile journey begins near the industrial docklands of Newport, where the iconic transporter bridge stands as a gateway to surprising urban biodiversity. Moving upstream to the gravelly stretches near Usk town, the river becomes a vital spawning ground for rare shad, a sea fish that migrates to freshwater to lay their eggs

programme.title: Blue Planet II

On the trail of the missing map, Humphrey soon has suspicions when he discovers that Geraldine has been selling her memorabilia to pay for her husbands care and recently had the map revalued. Drama, starring Kris Marshall

programme.desc: Monty Don is busy, as the garden bursts into colour. Woody herbs such as thyme and sage dont thrive in his clay soil, so hes sowing seeds to ensure a steady supply. programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programme.desc: Lucy uncovers the story of Edward IVs sons Edward and Richard, whose disappearance in 1483 has led to centuries of mystery. The princes were taken to the Tower of London for their own protection, but a priest declared the boys illegitimate and their uncle Richard next in line to the throne. The gaps in the historical record have fuelled 500 years of speculation, so Lucy speaks to history professor Tim Thornton, who has found evidence of one account of what happened written by Thomas More, while Richard III Society chair Matthew Lewis gives his views on the events

programme.title: Peelers: The PSNI for Real

programme.desc: An examination of several seemingly impossible things caught on film. programme.title: Curse of Skinwalker Ranch
programme.desc: When the team flies a cutting-edge radar device high above Skinwalker Ranch, it reveals shocking new clues about the Bubble and what may be inside the Mesa

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.sub-title: New Zealand and the Bass Strait
programme.desc: Untold stories of UFO sightings, abductions, and other paranormal events. The Bass Strait is a treacherous stretch of water that separates Tasmania from the Australian mainland. This episode documents the disappearance of pilot Frederick Valentich and his Cessna in the region. His last transmission gave a disturbing account of what the young pilot experienced

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts investigate remote ruins, mysterious caves and legendary mountain portals, asking if these alleged stargates have brought ancient aliens to Earth

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: In Egypt, a hideous creature that looks like a cross between a goat and a buffalo is filmed. A weird flash captured on CCTV in Tulsa, Oklahoma, could be the signature of an illegal rocket, launching a top-secret payload into orbit above America

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Les tells a frightening story of a hold-up at his grandfathers store, and a dominatrix brings her gear into the shop

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: The Detroit family pawn shop opens its doors on dodgy sellers, angry dealers, staff rifts and everything from a gynaecologists table to an elephants skull

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some of the nations top personalities turn their hand to being the countrys most opinionated viewers as they critique the weeks TV. Giving their view on the most talked about television of the week are Davina McCall with her partner Michael Douglas, Katherine Ryan and her husband Bobby, Jane McDonald and friend Sue, Rob Beckett and Tom Allen, Tom Grennan and his dad Martin, Munroe Bergdorf and Leomie Anderson, Stephen Mangan with his sister Anita, Chris Packham CBE with his step-daughter Megan, Big Zuu, Hyder and Tubsey, Paul Sinha and husband Olly, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Martin and Roman Kemp, and Clare Balding and Alice Arnold. This time, they share their opinions on The 1% Club, Spy in The Ocean, Fake Profile, Five Star Kitchen: Britains Next Great Chef and The Yorkshire Vet

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Both of the Great North Air Ambulances helicopters are dispatched to help a critically injured father and his two young sons, following a car collision in Cockermouth. The crew from Thames Valley Air Ambulance head to Bracknell, where Martin is having breathing difficulties. Plus, in Stanford-le-Hope, gardener Graham has a nasty open ankle fracture after falling off a ladder

programme.title: Wonders of the World I Cant See
programme.desc: Chris McCausland is joined by comedian and presenter Tom Allen in Rome, where they eat ice cream before it melts, zip around the city on a rickety Vespa, train to be gladiators, learn to sing opera and make pasta from scratch. And will Toms one-of-a-kind commentary do the Colosseum justice for Chris?

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: Sandi is joined by Eddie Izzard on an Irish adventure as they visit three holiday hideaways in Counties Clare, Kerry and Cork and bond over homemade apple crumble. Their first stop in County Clare is a miniature modern marvel called Teeroneer, a timber-clad, prize-winning property with a sunken kitchen that Sandi just cant resist cooking in. From there the pair head to Ark Ranch Treehouse. Hand-built by one woman, Sandi and Eddie are charmed by the sense of childhood adventure they feel. Finally, they head to Lost Cottage in the mountains and lakes of County Kerry. A classic fusion of old and new, the remote rental gives the pair an excuse for Sandi to take Eddie on her very first fishing trip

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Lelas, a Pomona, California, restaurant that is currently being run into the ground by its inexperienced owner. Gordon tries to turn the failing business around, but faces opposition from the chef and makes enemies when he exposes the suspect behaviour of some members of staff

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: Its the day before Eddie and Whitney leave London to set up their commune in Devon. With little time to lose, Maggie and the gang have cooked up a fake spiritual conference, with Whitney as the keynote speaker, as a way to rescue Eddie from her fraudulent friend - but in classic Maggie fashion, things quickly escalate

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: Maggie tries to put a broken Eddie back together by reminding her of all the good times theyve shared, so that they can get back to being best friends. They reminisce through flashbacks of their friendship, going back to Eddies dads wake in 2010 - the day they met. But while Maggie has always been there to brighten Eddies day, she also has a knack for ruining her important moments

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp shows how to turn trash into treasure with Mexican tin art, soap recycling and a lovable tin can dog

programme.title: Sarah Beenys New Country Lives
programme.desc: Gary and Annette make plans to split their Somerset vicarage in two so they can rent out one half and live in the other

programme.title: Countdown

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam challenges Woody to a racquetball game in a bid to prove he is still as spry and nimble as ever, but ends up injuring himself and realises hes getting old after all. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Save the Last Dance for Me
programme.desc: Carla and her ex-husband Nick enter a dancing competition, determined to relive their glory days as a prize-winning couple. Bar-room comedy, starring Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane and Sam go flying with a daredevil pilot famed for his high-altitude exploits - but unfortunately he dies at 20,000ft, leaving them well and truly in the lurch. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert returns to work after sick leave, but is soon driven to the conclusion that he does not have the nerve to be a policeman any more and decides to pursue a safer career in telemarketing

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert bumps into his ex-wife, and considers rekindling the relationship. Meanwhile, Frank tells Amy the story of how the pair split up in the first place

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part one of two. Marie surprises everyone by arranging a trip to Rome for the whole family, but all Ray can do is complain. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink goes all out to win when he and Roz are nominated for a radio award, but wishes he hadnt after he discovers he is up against a veteran talk-show host who is retiring. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin is furious to learn Frasier has thrown out his favourite chair to make space for a new one, and sends him out to retrieve it. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: As the advancing years begin to take their toll on Frasier, he wonders whether a relationship with a 20-year-old sales assistant would help him recapture some of his youthful vitality. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Cranes set off on a road trip in a motor home, but Martin complicates matters by inadvertently driving into Canada - which means they have to try to sneak Daphne back across the border due to the terms of her American visa. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for West Babylon, New York, to help the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts. The chef struggles to cope with disorganised staff and an unappealing menu, but quickly realises the real problem lies in the kitchen, where a lack of leadership and communication is causing serious trouble

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Wiltshire, Henry Cole and Gemma Longworth restore a vintage car, a weaving loom and a dough proving bin

programme.title: Matt Bakers British Isles

Then, in the Dumfries and Galloway countryside, he meets a self-taught food pioneer who grows mushrooms that are sought after by Michelin-star chefs worldwide

programme.desc: The Best of British pub prepares for St Georges Day, complete with a classic red London bus. Teenager Billy chases his football dream in St Pete Beach, while in Tampa, estate agent Justine has luxury flats to sell and a sunset cruise to plan

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are back to guide more house-hunters through an ever-changing market, beginning in Surrey, a commuter hotspot for people who work in London and a county filled with English charm. Emily and Jack have put their wedding on hold until they find a home but have so far fallen foul of houses not looking as good as they do in the brochures. Jane, who has worked all over the world, wants to put down roots in Farnham. Phil lives nearby but it soon becomes clear his local knowledge is no guarantee of an easy search

programme.title: Salisbury Poisonings: The Untold Story
programme.desc: The documentary charts the immediate fallout of the attack, as staff on the hospital ICU battled to save the lives of the Skripals and local police officer Nick Bailey, who had become accidentally contaminated with Novichok. Public health officials worked round the clock with specially trained British armed forces in an attempt to stop the spread of the poison across Salisbury, while counter-terrorism officers launched a manhunt for those responsible

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: The conclusion of a two-part edition. After a much-needed reality check from Gordon, the three sisters unite to rebuild their familys legacy. What starts as a heartfelt memorial for their late father turns into a high-stakes mission to revamp Callahans Seafood Bar and Grill

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Tall and confident army sergeant Paul is paired with Natalie, a former girl band member who usually goes for a very different kind of man. Will she fall for his charm? Kerry, a forensic psychologist, is on her first date since losing her hearing five years ago. She meets Dan, a gentle police officer, who may just be the kind of man she can open up to. And 80-something Dave is still chasing love after three divorces. He hopes his enthusiasm - and his love of weightlifting - will impress elegant widow Clare

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: A look at what happened after Gordon Ramsay headed to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he met husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who revealed a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faced the biggest challenge of the series to save Amys Baking Company - and a media furore unfolded after the episode was broadcast

programme.title: Pixie (2020)
programme.desc: To avenge her mothers death, a young woman named Pixie masterminds a heist. However, she must flee across Ireland from gangsters, take on the patriarchy, and choose her own destiny along the way. Crime comedy, starring Olivia Cooke, Fra Fee and Rory Fleck Byrne

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: Puerto Rico is a critical front line in Americas war on drugs. As the US pours billions into military operations across the Caribbean - to seize the former President of Venezuela, and intercept drug shipments - federal agents on the island are stepping up raids against powerful gangs. Reporter Guillermo Galdos joins the Drug Enforcement Agency and police on high-risk operations in San Juan, where major arrests and drug seizures reveal the scale of the trade

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners in Berkshire take part in the dinner party competition, hoping to secure the £1,000 prize. First to host are Toots and Jamie, whose eccentric menu reflects their unconventional approach to life. Next, German-born Kat and RAF air cadet trainer Scott throw a military-themed bash, before its the turn of self-confessed perfectionist Kevin and his partner Clare, who have confidence in their foodie menu

programme.title: Sarah Beenys New Country Lives
programme.desc: The property expert follows city people embracing fresh starts in beautiful rural retreats. Here, James tackles his master bedroom as he renovates his home into a holiday rental. He then starts to consider how to market it

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by actrress and comedian Nina Wadia in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The gang go over to Sams to watch The Magnificent Seven, but accidentally leave Diane out of their plans - and feel so guilty they decide to take her to the opera instead. Unfortunately, she is overwhelmed by all the attention and mistakenly believes Sam is responsible

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam hires a new member of staff who proves popular with colleagues and customers alike, making Woody fear his days at the bar are numbered. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part one of three. When councilwoman Janet Eldridge visits the bar during her re-election campaign, Sam is smitten, so a jealous Diane joins the opposition to save him from the politicians dubious charms. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part two of two. As the familys Roman holiday continues, Robert falls in love with sultry local beauty Stefania (Alex Meneses), who works in an ice-cream shop

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie and Frank accidentally crash their car through the wall of Rays house, causing a bitter family dispute - and forcing Debra into the role of peacemaker. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert believes Amy is the woman of his dreams and decides to tell her the truth about Joanne and Stefania, but she is so shocked by the confession that she refuses to take him back

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier decide to collaborate on a self-help book about sibling relationships. After struggling to write it they lock themselves in a hotel room until it is finished, but petty jealousy reigns and the Crane brothers are soon at each others throats

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Food critic Gil takes over the radio show to cover for an ailing Frasier - who immediately fears his job is under threat and resolves to get back on air without delay. Comedy, starring Edward Hibbert and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles meets his brother at Cafe Nervosa, where Frasier reflects on his first year in Seattle - and whether he is actually happy with his life in the city. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink reads a steamy novel written by an old acquaintance from Boston - and discovers his teenage affair with a piano teacher has found its way into the plot. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island. The no-nonsense chef struggles to persuade hot-headed owner Abby to make his suggested changes, and a confrontation results in him being thrown out of the building in the middle of a dinner service. The eaterys co-owner and financier begs Gordon to return, but his success hinges on his ability to win Abby over

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole head to Buckinghamshire, where their restorations include a pair of manhole covers, a water pump and a beehive

programme.title: Matt Bakers British Isles
programme.desc: Matt meets a family whose generations have been drawn back to Northern Irelands most northerly tip to spend their days combining a love of native breed horses and of their homeland. Matt also heads to Falkirk to meet the people dedicated to caring for two of Scotlands manmade wonders, the 100-feet-high Kelpies and the Falkirk Wheel - the worlds only rotating boat lift

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by actrress and comedian Nina Wadia in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman meets Allie and Cliff who are looking to buy a new permanent residence on the Greek island of Crete with a budget of £240,000

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Irish dance teacher Sarah has the busiest day of her school year - St Patricks Day - as she shows off her students talents all over town, including at the very bar where she met her husband, Scott. Can she combine a hectic dance routine with her own wedding celebration? Its a busy day for Kay Rawlins too, as she counts down to kick-off in her job as founder of one of the biggest soccer clubs in the USA. But she hasnt forgotten her roots in Stoke. Donna and Dan pay a surprise visit to their teenage son Oliver as he works poolside in his summer job at one of the most famous hotels in Florida - the Don CeSar - where his parents spent their first holiday together over 30 years ago

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In Brittany, Donna and Paul return to the basement of their five-storey home, and the race is on to install the final windows and seal the rear façade before the elements take over. At Château de la Grillère, Tim and Sharon are desperate to open their doors to guests, but with a first-floor suite unfinished, a window seat to build and wasps in the chimney, everything is against them

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Almería, Sharon and Shaun Garner are feeling the pressure after a sudden run of sales leaves them short on properties and forces them to pull out all the stops for artists Declan and Claudia. Away from the viewings, the Garners try a bold new approach to marketing - with chaotic results. Meanwhile, in Murcia, Natalie and Darren Brown meet recently retired John and Siobhan from Ireland, who are ready to find a forever home in the sun, with space for visiting grandkids top of the list

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: Pauls nostalgic railway journey continues in Wales, where he takes to the footplate of steam and diesel locomotives to get to a sheep market, then rides an ultra-modern signal-less line to watch majestic ospreys. He is put to work servicing a slate-hauling steam train in the birthplace of Thomas the Tank Engine, before a ride in a small locomotive, like the ones that were used to transport tea in India, to experience the quirky beauty of Portmeirion

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: As the series reaches its halfway point, the Taskmaster is starting to know what to expect from his current crop of comics - but even hes surprised by the outrage Armando Iannucci causes with an ostrich, how Amy Gledhill struggles to remember the word for tube, and what Kumail Nanjiani does to time itself. Meanwhile, Joel Dommett has hours of fun with pots and pans, and Joanna Page and Alex Horne have an intimate conversation about guinea pigs

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy game show with Joe Wilkinson and Alex Brooker taking on Kevin Bridges and Judi Love. Regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley and lexicographer Susie Dent are on hand to adjudicate, with Peter Serafinowicz in the guise of Brian Butterfield joining Susie in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: TFI Friday Unplugged
programme.desc: Chris Evans brings his entertainment show back to Channel 4 in a more intimate format, featuring interviews with the biggest stars and music by the latest bands from the presenters studio at Virgin Radio UK

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: The course enters the high-stakes Dating Phase. Guided by experts, the virgins learn to escalate and navigate consent. Tegan is tested by her struggles with self-acceptance, and Ellens extreme anxiety makes her question if dating is for her. Alex has a breakthrough in an intimate session with Ilil, and for two members of the group, sparks begin to fly for real during dating practice

programme.title: Virgin Island
programme.desc: The nudity phase begins, giving the group members a chance to confront body insecurities and become more familiar with their anatomy. Katie faces painful memories of bullying, Bertie is keen to have his first kiss and Tegan takes a major step towards intimacy with Risdon, experiencing connection through touch like never before

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleones, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. Pete maintains he makes the best pizza in town - based on a review from the 1980s - but the fiery chefs own taste test proves the opposite. With Petes wife Paulette and son Josh threatening to leave, can Gordon get through to him and save the business?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Lancashire couples compete to host the best dinner party and win a cash prize. Laidback Howard and his wife Lisa kick things off but fail to impress everyone with their lacklustre menu, before Michael and Jennis evening leaves guests bored with table talk of transport, bemused by a collection of model busses, and repulsed by a rogue hair in the starter dish. Finally, Luke and Louise deliver a polished performance, which is let down by an over-cooked main course, before the winning couple is revealed

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Tall and confident army sergeant Paul is paired with Natalie, a former girl band member who usually goes for a very different kind of man. Will she fall for his charm? Kerry, a forensic psychologist, is on her first date since losing her hearing five years ago. She meets Dan, a gentle police officer, who may just be the kind of man she can open up to. And 80-something Dave is still chasing love after three divorces. He hopes his enthusiasm - and his love of weightlifting - will impress elegant widow Clare

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: Sandi is joined by Eddie Izzard on an Irish adventure as they visit three holiday hideaways in Counties Clare, Kerry and Cork and bond over homemade apple crumble. Their first stop in County Clare is a miniature modern marvel called Teeroneer, a timber-clad, prize-winning property with a sunken kitchen that Sandi just cant resist cooking in. From there the pair head to Ark Ranch Treehouse. Hand-built by one woman, Sandi and Eddie are charmed by the sense of childhood adventure they feel. Finally, they head to Lost Cottage in the mountains and lakes of County Kerry. A classic fusion of old and new, the remote rental gives the pair an excuse for Sandi to take Eddie on her very first fishing trip

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Lelas, a Pomona, California, restaurant that is currently being run into the ground by its inexperienced owner. Gordon tries to turn the failing business around, but faces opposition from the chef and makes enemies when he exposes the suspect behaviour of some members of staff

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: Its the day before Eddie and Whitney leave London to set up their commune in Devon. With little time to lose, Maggie and the gang have cooked up a fake spiritual conference, with Whitney as the keynote speaker, as a way to rescue Eddie from her fraudulent friend - but in classic Maggie fashion, things quickly escalate

programme.title: Big Mood
programme.desc: Maggie tries to put a broken Eddie back together by reminding her of all the good times theyve shared, so that they can get back to being best friends. They reminisce through flashbacks of their friendship, going back to Eddies dads wake in 2010 - the day they met. But while Maggie has always been there to brighten Eddies day, she also has a knack for ruining her important moments

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp shows how to turn trash into treasure with Mexican tin art, soap recycling and a lovable tin can dog

programme.title: Sarah Beenys New Country Lives
programme.desc: Gary and Annette make plans to split their Somerset vicarage in two so they can rent out one half and live in the other

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by actress and comedian Nina Wadia in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam challenges Woody to a racquetball game in a bid to prove he is still as spry and nimble as ever, but ends up injuring himself and realises hes getting old after all. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Save the Last Dance for Me
programme.desc: Carla and her ex-husband Nick enter a dancing competition, determined to relive their glory days as a prize-winning couple. Bar-room comedy, starring Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane and Sam go flying with a daredevil pilot famed for his high-altitude exploits - but unfortunately he dies at 20,000ft, leaving them well and truly in the lurch. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert returns to work after sick leave, but is soon driven to the conclusion that he does not have the nerve to be a policeman any more and decides to pursue a safer career in telemarketing

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert bumps into his ex-wife, and considers rekindling the relationship. Meanwhile, Frank tells Amy the story of how the pair split up in the first place

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part one of two. Marie surprises everyone by arranging a trip to Rome for the whole family, but all Ray can do is complain. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink goes all out to win when he and Roz are nominated for a radio award, but wishes he hadnt after he discovers he is up against a veteran talk-show host who is retiring. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin is furious to learn Frasier has thrown out his favourite chair to make space for a new one, and sends him out to retrieve it. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: As the advancing years begin to take their toll on Frasier, he wonders whether a relationship with a 20-year-old sales assistant would help him recapture some of his youthful vitality. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Cranes set off on a road trip in a motor home, but Martin complicates matters by inadvertently driving into Canada - which means they have to try to sneak Daphne back across the border due to the terms of her American visa. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for West Babylon, New York, to help the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts. The chef struggles to cope with disorganised staff and an unappealing menu, but quickly realises the real problem lies in the kitchen, where a lack of leadership and communication is causing serious trouble

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Wiltshire, Henry Cole and Gemma Longworth restore a vintage car, a weaving loom and a dough proving bin

programme.title: Matt Bakers British Isles
programme.desc: Matt Baker explores the Ffestiniog hills of north Waless World Heritage Landscape, meeting a man who has committed his working life to the future of the worlds oldest independent railway company. Then, in the Dumfries and Galloway countryside, he meets a self-taught food pioneer who grows mushrooms that are sought after by Michelin-star chefs worldwide

Meanwhile, in Murcia, Natalie and Darren Brown meet recently retired John and Siobhan from Ireland, who are ready to find a forever home in the sun, with space for visiting grandkids top of the list

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: Pauls nostalgic railway journey continues in Wales, where he takes to the footplate of steam and diesel locomotives to get to a sheep market, then rides an ultra-modern signal-less line to watch majestic ospreys. He is put to work servicing a slate-hauling steam train in the birthplace of Thomas the Tank Engine, before a ride in a small locomotive, like the ones that were used to transport tea in India, to experience the quirky beauty of Portmeirion

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: As the series reaches its halfway point, the Taskmaster is starting to know what to expect from his current crop of comics - but even hes surprised by the outrage Armando Iannucci causes with an ostrich, how Amy Gledhill struggles to remember the word for tube, and what Kumail Nanjiani does to time itself. Meanwhile, Joel Dommett has hours of fun with pots and pans, and Joanna Page and Alex Horne have an intimate conversation about guinea pigs

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleones, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. Pete maintains he makes the best pizza in town - based on a review from the 1980s - but the fiery chefs own taste test proves the opposite. With Petes wife Paulette and son Josh threatening to leave, can Gordon get through to him and save the business?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Lancashire couples compete to host the best dinner party and win a cash prize. Laidback Howard and his wife Lisa kick things off but fail to impress everyone with their lacklustre menu, before Michael and Jennis evening leaves guests bored with table talk of transport, bemused by a collection of model busses, and repulsed by a rogue hair in the starter dish. Finally, Luke and Louise deliver a polished performance, which is let down by an over-cooked main course, before the winning couple is revealed

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra tries to create a sense of affection and familiarity by addressing Marie as mom - but the gesture backfires badly and offends her real mother, who finds it inappropriate

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.desc: Part two of three. Marie and Debras feud continues, so Ray and Frank use it to their advantage, while Robert tries to get the warring pair to make friends. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Pregnant Rachel considers moving out, prompting Ross to tell her about a vacancy in his building, and Joey creates a nursery to persuade her to stay. programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel finally tells her father she is pregnant, prompting him to confront Ross - who is just snuggling up to new girlfriend Mona. Monica feels guilty about denying Chandler a stripper on his stag night so she books one to make amends - but he gets a lot more than he bargained for

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang celebrates Thanksgiving and Monica invites old high-school friend Will, the only student who was fatter than her - unaware of his animosity toward Rachel. programme.desc: Phoebe discovers Ben goes to school with Stings son and immediately sets about trying to wangle free concert tickets. programme.sub-title: The One with the Creepy Holiday Card
programme.desc: Rachels hormones act up, prompting her to proposition Joey, and Chandlers newly divorced boss takes him to a strip club, convinced he and Monica are having problems. Meanwhile, Ross is disturbed to learn girlfriend Mona wants them to send out joint Christmas cards like a married couple

programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Dates Rachel

programme.title: Jamies Great Britain
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver travels to Yorkshire and discovers how the Industrial Revolution changed Britains favourite dishes. From Persian-inspired lamb shanks with British ale, to Jewish smoked trout, the chef meets people from all over the world to learn how immigrant workers have drawn on their own ethnic culinary traditions to reflect the changing tastes of Britain today

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten and Giada De Laurentiis prepare a lobster and potato salad lunch, along with mascarpone and lemon gnocchi with thyme butter sauce

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten prepares a towering chocolate birthday cake with Tyler Florence, and the duo visit the local farming scene to buy some chicken and vegetables

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host dairy week, with Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood judging the bakers efforts. The first of the three challenges is a decorative signature bake that involves a tricky turn-out. The bakers then move onto the technical, which is a complex recipe with a long history that dates back to Henry VIII. With the first day behind them, the contestants regroup for the final challenge of the week - an intricate showstopper usually found at the centre of Indian weddings

programme.title: Mary Berry Everyday
programme.desc: The food writer and former Great British Bake Off judge continues to celebrate the everyday food and ingredients she has always loved, from hearty and wholesome ideas to easy-to-make crowd-pleasers and family classics. In this edition, Mary focuses on food that exemplifies indulgence, demonstrating mouth-watering dishes that give the mundane a lift with lashings of naughtiness. Treats are in store as she investigates the history of the British pie and reveals the secrets to making an easy sticky toffee pudding

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Michelin-starred chef Gareth Ward for a tour of Mid Wales. They begin at a cider-tasting, which James uses to dish up some cider-infused apple fritters. Gareth discovers a farm where the Wagyu cattle fed on local beer. Away from the culinary activities, Gareth is challenged to a rally car ride and James demonstrates his dog training prowess with his trusty hound Cooper

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: In Englands first National Park, the Peak District, James is joined by restaurateur Tessa Bramley, who serves him a beef fillet alongside vegetables from her own garden. He also takes part in an unusual contest - hen racing - where he challenges a local lad and world champion to a race. After discovering some award-winning gin, James meets a local forager and samples some of his elderflower wine. Finally, he uses some of the foraged elderflowers to make a delicious dessert

In this edition, Mary focuses on food that exemplifies indulgence, demonstrating mouth-watering dishes that give the mundane a lift with lashings of naughtiness. Treats are in store as she investigates the history of the British pie and reveals the secrets to making an easy sticky toffee pudding

programme.title: Paul Hollywood: City Bakes

programme.desc: Prue cooks a range of recipes perfect for entertaining guests before welcoming her Great British Bake Off colleague Alison Hammond into her kitchen. Prue makes two recipes using watermelon to demonstrate its versatility, and hears from a group of friends producing smoked salmon

programme.desc: The chef visits East Anglia, Lincolnshire and the Midlands. He samples a host of regional specialities including Norfolk black turkeys, Lincolnshire chine, pork pies and Stilton. programme.title: Jamies Great Britain
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver travels to south Wales, where he learns about how late-19th-century coal boom has continued to influence British food culture to this day. He samples classic Italian home cooking, and visits a mosque and community centre in Tiger Bay. Inspired by his experiences, he cooks a 12-hour rabbit bolognese and lamb lollipops with dips and toasted crunchy nuts

programme.desc: The American chef is joined by Michael Symon and the duo prepare a Greek menu including smoked pork ribs, tzatziki and spicy houmous

programme.desc: Ina Garten prepares a chocolate-themed menu including cupcakes with a peanut butter frosting, chocolate gelato, a chocolate orange fondue and white chocolate truffles

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig introduce a special round of the baking challenge in which contestants must create confectionery inspired by the Roaring Twenties. The signature challenge involves a decorative twist on custard pies, while the technical round will be a test of the bakers timing and consistency. Finally, for the Shows, they must create a three-tiered masterpiece inspired by their tipple of choice. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith are on hand to assess the results of their efforts and decide who will be leaving the tent

programme.title: Mary Berry Everyday
programme.desc: The food writer shares ideas to make everyday family meals special with no-fuss dishes and also tries her hand at milking a goat before showing her granddaughter how to make her own goats cheese for a family picnic

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: The chef is joined by Brian Turner to explore the culinary delights of his native Yorkshire, with James visiting Frances Atkins restaurant The Yorke Arms, where he enjoys her signature dish al fresco in her unusual dining room the Onion. programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James joins up with fellow chef Lisa Goodwin-Allen to explore Whitby, in James home county of North Yorkshire. James pops into his favourite fish and chip shop before cooking tikka mackerel buns with fennel and apple salad for the crowds at Whitby bandstand. Lisa, meanwhile, pays a visit to Michelin-starred restaurant The Black Swan, to see how its huge kitchen garden provides almost all of the produce used in the kitchen

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James is joined by chef Lisa Goodwin-Allen in Lancashire, where they visit a food hall and a brewery in Clitheroe, as well Lisas Michelin-starred restaurant Northcote in the village of Langho. Sci-fi thriller, starring Jason Statham, Joan Allen, Ian McShane and Tyrese Gibson

Martial arts thriller, starring Jet Li, Jason Statham, Devon Aoki, Luis Guzman and Saul Rubinek

Crime thriller, starring Richard Gere, Andy Garcia, Laurie Metcalf, Nancy Travis and William Baldwin

Admitted into the inner circle of a Miami drug lord, he ultimately takes over his bosss empire and even his wife. However, his paranoia and cocaine addiction begin to spiral out of control, while his enemies circle, waiting for the chance to bring him down. Gangster thriller remake, with Al Pacino, Michelle Pfeiffer and Robert Loggia

programme.title: Ulzanas Raid (1972)
