programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Niki, 34, is airlifted to St Georges after crashing into another rider during a charity bike ride between London and Brighton. While staff try to contact Nikis wife Phill, who is almost 300 miles away at their home in the north east of England, 90-year-old Peter is rushed to AandE with severe blood poisoning

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a man who is in cardiac arrest. They fight to keep him alive while next door his wife hopes for a miracle, on their wedding anniversary. There are reports of a 16-year-old who has collapsed by a canal. Paramedics can see a light being waved at them, but in the dark its not easy to find their patient. Plus, a mother calls 999 when her three-year-old is struggling to breathe

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The air ambulance is dispatched to collect Frances, an 80-year-old woman who fell three metres into her empty swimming pool while gardening, and has sustained a head wound that could have resulted in a life-altering bleed on the brain. Ruth, aged 86, arrives at St Georges AandE with her heart beating three times faster than the normal rate. Doctors are concerned it may not be pumping enough blood around her body, and quickly prescribe fast-acting medication. Plus, students Jerry and Sakille turn up at the hospital after Jerry crashed her car on the way home from a party. While Jerry stayed sober to serve as the designated driver, she concludes that balancing a full-time job with her studies and a hectic social life might not be a sensible idea

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Michelle, whos 54, is airlifted to St Georges after being involved in a car crash with her husband Paul in Surrey. She was given a blood transfusion at the scene and doctors work quickly to get her to CT to ascertain the full extent of her injuries. Cameras also follow Derren, 41, who has fractured his ankle while trampolining with his 12-year-old daughter, Macie

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Max McMurdo restore and upcycle 2CV headlamps, a childrens rocking horse, a Victorian streetlamp and a high chair

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien explore a fairground, and collect a bicycle made for two, a ships search lamp and a lambing chair

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to the Miners Arms in Nenthead, Cumbria, where sisters Alison Baker and Lynda Clark hope that their eco credentials will impress their guests. However, brothers Andrew and James Widdas have to face their fear of shared bathrooms. The group get crafty by upcycling old rubbish, allowing Nigel and Pok U Regan to show off some hidden talents. At dinner, Kev Argent and Tor Johnson realise theres stiff competition from their fellow greenies. In the morning, Alison and Lynda face some tough feedback over facilities

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Brothers Andrew and James Widdas aim to provide boutique on a budget at the Rose and Crown in Edgworth, near Bolton, but they only have eight months of experience, and BandB veterans Alison and Lynda are quick to find fault. During an afternoon of decorating gingerbread houses, Pok U and Nigel are accused of trying to bribe the hosts, and as the concept of boutique is shot down over dinner, there are simmering tensions. In the morning, Kev and Tor wonder whether anyone can challenge professional chef Andrews breakfast spread, and Andrew and James struggle with some of their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nigel and Pok U Regan cultivate an east-meets-west atmosphere at their BandB and Cantonese restaurant, the Bingham Townhouse in Nottinghamshire. Their guests arent all happy when they arrive, with Andrew and James unsure about sleeping in single beds. Kev and Tors focus and meditation skills are tested when the group are challenged to an archery competition. Alison and Lynda are staggered when they find out that Nigel bought the BandB on a whim, and have a bad taste in their mouths when he calls them sweet and sour. At breakfast, Nigel struggles to run a smooth service

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Float by Boat near Rugby, partners Kev Argent and Tor Johnson run mindfulness breaks from their narrowboat, Spirited Away. Alison and Lynda arent keen on the tiny shared bathroom, tight space and curtained-off bunks, and Andrew and James fret over communal living. Theres tension following Nigel and Pok Us feedback, so Kev and Tor try to unite their shipmates with group meditation. At breakfast, questions are raised over the confused branding, and at feedback time all of the guests facilities scores leave Kev and Tor speechless

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to find out what theyve been paid and to settle some scores. Mike and Neal from the Highlands Pub challenge the comments that they were considered dirty and lacking in facilities, while Sean and Kathryn from the White House are left smarting after suffering large underpayments for what they think are minor issues. Eventually, the winner is finally revealed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog-lover Kerry Bolwell-Williams kicks off a week of dinner parties in the Welsh valleys, where she hopes that a full choir and a simple menu will impress her guests and make her an early contender for the £1,000 prize. However, she does not react well when it is suggested that her home has a rather distinctive smell

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Food-lover and theme park fan Dave Morris hosts the second dinner party in the Welsh valleys, hoping his home-grown herbs, hand-picked fruit and complicated menu will win him the £1,000 cash prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Shop owner Tasnim Sardar hosts the third night of the competition in the Welsh valleys, and hopes her Pakistani-inspired party will secure her the £1,000 prize. Financial advisor Gill Leonard likes her curries to be hot and spicy, and is particularly pleased by Tasnims curried cauliflower

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ryan Woodward hosts on the fourth night in the Welsh valleys and has put a lot of thought into his evening, but each of his courses goes wrong - from a bread blunder to a clam crisis. He hopes an Ibizan dance lesson and drinks served in his hot tub will help to turn the party around

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in the Welsh valleys, financial advisor Gill Leonard dons the oven gloves to entertain the other contestants, and there is a dramatic start to the evening thanks to a mock fire-breathing dragon. Later, the host makes a remarkable revelation to her shocked guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Another selection of BandB owners take it in turns as hosts to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money. The contest begins at Dunsandles Guest House in New Brighton, Merseyside, where owner Alan Johnson and his professional sidekick Dave Owen hope to win the title - but a scandal with some unwanted hair on the bed sheets is not a good start, and two guests feel they are making an exhibition of themselves with a tea-trolley in full view of the neighbours

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On the second day of the competition, the contestants visit the Lady Teal Hotel Boat on the waterways near Burnley in Lancashire, and owners Nick and Gina Mead hope to impress them with an afternoon of entertainment out on the locks. At breakfast, one of the guests admits to not enjoying his stay

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: From York House in Tetbury, Gloucestershire, where Brock Bergius hopes that his cheeky sense of humour and perfectionist nature will help him win the competition. He is in his element making saucy jokes during an afternoon of sausage making, but his reluctance to stray from the menu at breakfast leaves some of his guests disappointed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Heyford House in Oxfordshire, where Leo and Sonya Brooke-Little hope to impress the contestants with their hospitality. The afternoon event is boxing, which Brock Burgius sees as the perfect opportunity to settle some scores with his fellow competitors

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks winner is announced as the BandB owners meet for the last time to thrash out their differences. Feedback includes criticism of a badly positioned tea tray, controversy over a hot chocolate and accusations of overenthusiastic hosting

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer search Bristol with Josh and Anna, who are buying their first home together, and Sue and Samira, who are moving from London to a city they barely know for a change of pace in their life. However, one couple have a budget that falls short of their requirements, while the other pair appear to lack confidence when it comes to making a decision

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet a couple in Rushden, Northamptonshire, who are unsure whether they should renovate their current home or sell up and move into another. Susan and John are torn over their unique five-bed character home, so Kirstie and Phil offer their expert advice in an effort to help them make the right decision for their familys future

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Pete and Aey order a factory-built house to be constructed in Wales and transported to their rural West Sussex plot, where they plan to demolish an older property to make way for the new one. But there are two big problems - the old house is home to hibernating bats, and moving five gigantic modules down tiny lanes from Wales to Sussex is not going to be easy

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Aaron, 31, is rushed to St Georges after overturning his car onto metal railings during a high-speed collision. He has a serious laceration to his face where a spiked railing narrowly missed his eye socket. Cameras also follow Fiona, 65, who is rushed to the hospital after falling over in a restaurant and cutting her knee during her friend Evelyns 70th birthday party

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Doctors treat a young woman who has been thrown from a horse, which then trampled on her, and also a woman who was hit by a car while riding her motorbike on a dual carriageway. An 11-year-old boy is brought into hospital after running into a wall at school and hurting his wrist

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The air ambulance teams are called out to help Dennis, whos suffering a heart attack. A spin on her bike has catastrophic consequences for Carolyn. Plus, theres a dramatic night-time car crash in Norfolk

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Aaron, 31, is rushed to St Georges after overturning his car onto metal railings during a high-speed collision. He has a serious laceration to his face where a spiked railing narrowly missed his eye socket. Cameras also follow Fiona, 65, who is rushed to the hospital after falling over in a restaurant and cutting her knee during her friend Evelyns 70th birthday party

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Niki, 34, is airlifted to St Georges after crashing into another rider during a charity bike ride between London and Brighton. While staff try to contact Nikis wife Phill, who is almost 300 miles away at their home in the north east of England, 90-year-old Peter is rushed to AandE with severe blood poisoning

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty, Kate Quilton and Matt Tebbutt present some of their favourite investigations. In Israel, Kate unearths the mystery ingredient that makes icing sugar so light, fluffy and powdery. In Iceland, Jimmy investigates Skyr, a mysterious yoghurt-like product, and in Cornwall, Matt dives for edible seaweed that has started cropping up on supermarket shelves

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Gloucestershire, Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit landed gent Sir Benjamin Slade as they search for more upcycling prospects. Simon converts a gilded picture frame into a flat-screen TV surround, while Henry refurbishes a club fender fire surround and turns a quick profit on a Fordson tractor

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien find, fix and flog unwanted possessions on behalf of their owners. Henry and Simon realise profit potential in an old crop sprayer, a cast iron fire guard and some old wooden workshop clamps

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The latest competition starts in Filey, North Yorkshire, at The White Lodge Hotel, where hosts James and Kim Hodgson hope their love of luxury and high standards will impress their guests. During an afternoon at the lifeboat station, Kerry and Nicola from Camp Katur reveal their competitive nature. At dinner, there are differences of opinions between the guests. James and Kim find some home truths in their feedback,but insist they wont lower themselves to tit for tat

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Amanda Lucia-Charley and her friend Alan Talbot invite the other hoteliers to sample the delights of Crystals on the Prom in Blackpool, where Alan introduces his alter-ego Ada

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the Red Lion Country Inn in Upper Poppleton, North Yorkshire, where Mark and Jean Lee hope their plain and simple pub BandB will impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest ends at glamping site Camp Katur in Kirklington, North Yorkshire, where Kerry Roy and Nicola Wilding hope to wow their guests with their unique geodomes and see-through pods

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the contest arrives, and while Amanda Lucia-Charley and Alan Talbot receive harsh criticism of their breakfast, Mark and Jean Lees decor receives scathing reviews

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trainee teacher Kirsty Davenport kicks off a week of dinner parties in Eastbourne, East Sussex, where she hopes that a simple menu will impress her guests - property finder Ann-Marie Hamilton, sales consultant Russell Turnbull, part-time lecturer Adam Holt and hairdresser Becci Moloney

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ann-Marie Hamilton hosts day two in Eastbourne, where she plans to entertain her guests by singing in her garden. Fellow contestant Russell makes a lot of jokes, but foodie Adam does not seem amused

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Becci Moloney hosts the third dinner party in Eastbourne, East Sussex, and prepares a menu of hearty food for her guests. Her outdoor bar makes a positive impression on rivals Kirsty and Ann-Marie, but Russell and Adam are puzzled by her collection of recycled toilets in the garden

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Adam Holt hosts the fourth dinner party in Eastbourne, East Sussex, where his fellow competitors expectations are high. However, some of them are surprised by his menu - which fails to amount to much more than sausages and mashed potato

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Raconteur Russell Turnbull hosts the final night in Eastbourne, East Sussex. Having played his cards close to his chest all week with regards to his culinary skills, his plans for a fancy menu intrigue his rivals. However, for all the bravado, it remains to be seen whether he can actually cook

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition gets under way at the Oak Tree Cottage in Burley, Hampshire, where owner Jacqui Castle and her sidekick Jane Waters hope the homely approach will win the day. Guests Martin and Catherine Crosswaite are not encouraged by the shared facilities, while breakfast served at a communal table is not to the liking of Norman Butcher and Lorraine Watkins

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Baths the Rising Sun Inn, where owners Lorraine Hawkins and Norman Butcher hope to bring their guests up to standard by having a dress code. Following their feedback on the last visit, Jacqui and Jane take an extra critical eye to the rooms, while Martin and Catherine show their competitive streak during a boules match

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Busfeild Arms in East Morton for the third day of the contest, where hosts Martin and Catherine Croswaite pride themselves in giving great Yorkshire hospitality. Jacqui is overwhelmed by the luxury and extras in the rooms, which raises questions about how the owners make a profit. Meanwhile, Martin shocks the group by sharing his stunt motorbike riding past, and later, Patrick feels the pressure of being the final host

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stopover is at Patrick Duggans Beatles-themed Epstein House in Liverpool, the former home of band manager Brian Epsteins father. Jacqui and Jane are unimpressed by unpleasant smells in the bedroom, while Martin and Catherine show they will do anything to win during a game of Fab Four charades. At dinner, Patrick shocks his guests when he reveals his idea of the ideal woman. Will it have an effect on their feedback?

programme.title: WWII: Operation Barbarossa
programme.desc: Part one of two. Nazi Germanys invasion of the Soviet Union. programme.desc: An extraordinary search on behalf of Kate Brown from Portsmouth takes on twists and turns and unveils one missing relative after another. At a towering monument overlooking the River Forth, Michael hears how, in 1297, William Wallace inflicted a shocking defeat on the English army at Stirling Bridge. Travelling across country to the River Tay, Michael discovers the city of Perth, before heading to the banks of the Tay for a magical sunset canoe trip to spot beavers

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Part one of two. Russert and Munch investigate the murder of a man found at the grave of his dead wife. Starring Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: At Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part III (1989)
programme.desc: The teenage martial arts expert becomes obsessed with defending his championship title, but wise mentor Mr Miyagi is not prepared to help him fight for such a shallow goal. Seeking someone else to help guide his career, he falls under the influence of a crooked trainer - who is secretly plotting his downfall with the help of an old adversary. Adventure sequel, starring Ralph Macchio and Pat Morita

programme.title: Birdy (1984)
programme.desc: A young soldier devastated by his nightmarish experiences in the Vietnam War is committed to an Army mental hospital. He comes to believe he is a bird, and dreams of taking his fantasy to the logical, ultimate conclusion - by learning to fly. Alan Parkers psychological drama, based on William Whartons novel, with Matthew Modine, Nicolas Cage, John Harkins, Karen Young and Sandy Baron

programme.title: Amadeus (1984)
programme.desc: Composer Antonio Salieri is a favoured artist in the court of Austrian emperor Joseph II, but he finds himself pushed aside in favour of Mozart. Salieri admires the younger maestros music, but is incensed that someone so vulgar and obnoxious should be gifted with such talent. As jealousy consumes him, he plots his rivals downfall. Period drama, adapted by Peter Shaffer from his own play and starring F Murray Abraham and Tom Hulce

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married (1986)
programme.desc: A depressed fortysomething woman about to get divorced faints at a high-school reunion and awakes to find she has travelled back in time to her teenage years. Given the chance to put things right, she resolves to avoid a relationship with the man she is about to divorce. Comedy, starring Kathleen Turner, Nicolas Cage, Maureen OSullivan, Joan Allen, Catherine Hicks and Kevin J OConnor

programme.title: The Natural
programme.desc: A baseball prodigys dreams of sporting stardom are cut short when he gets shot. Once he has recovered from his injuries, he rejoins his team as a rookie recruit at an age when most players are thinking of retiring - only to enjoy an unexpected run of success. Drama, starring Robert Redford, Glenn Close, Kim Basinger, Robert Duvall and Barbara Hershey

programme.title: Caddyshack (1980)
programme.desc: A host of weird and wacky characters cause mayhem at an exclusive golf club, including a laid-back professional player, an obnoxious millionaire, the snobbish club president, a motley collection of teenage caddies and a psychotic groundskeeper engaging in a fight to the death with a canny gopher. Comedy, starring Chevy Chase, Bill Murray, Michael OKeefe and Rodney Dangerfield

programme.title: Trading Places (1983)
programme.desc: Two billionaire brothers engineer the downfall of a high-flying stockbroker, while giving a homeless conman all the advantages of wealth, as part of a bet to see whether heredity or upbringing determines character. Comedy, starring Dan Aykroyd, Eddie Murphy, Jamie Lee Curtis, Ralph Bellamy, Don Ameche and Denholm Elliott

programme.title: Innerspace (1987)
programme.desc: A Navy test pilot is shrunk in a ground-breaking scientific experiment, but instead of being injected into a laboratory rabbit, the tiny specimen accidentally winds up inside a hypochondriac supermarket worker. As he tries to find a way out, criminals come after the unlikely duo in search of the secret of the miniaturising technology. Sci-fi comedy, starring Dennis Quaid, Martin Short, Meg Ryan, Kevin McCarthy, Fiona Lewis and Vernon Wells

programme.title: The Last Starfighter (1984)
programme.desc: A teenager breaks the world record for a video game depicting spaceship battles, unaware the game is based on a real interplanetary war and has been created as a test to recruit fighter pilots. When a besieged planets entire fleet is wiped out, he is forced to take on an entire alien armada single-handed. Sci-fi adventure, starring Lance Guest and Robert Preston

programme.title: Batteries Not Included (1987)
programme.desc: A family of tiny alien spacecraft intervenes to help the residents of a run-down Manhattan brownstone tenement stop greedy developers from demolishing their homes. However, the miniature flying saucers have the odds stacked against them as they bravely do all they can to save the day. Sci-fi fantasy, starring Jessica Tandy, Hume Cronyn, Frank McRae and Elizabeth Pena.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A teenager at a new school befriends a pretty girl, but her ex-boyfriend is jealous and attacks him. During one particularly bad fight, a wise old caretaker intervenes and defeats the youngsters assailants using his martial arts skills. He goes on to mentor the boy and teach him karate so he can face his enemies in a tournament. Drama, with Ralph Macchio, Pat Morita and Elisabeth Shue

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II (1986)
programme.desc: High-kicking teenager Daniel accompanies his venerable mentor Mr Miyagi when he returns to the Japanese province of Okinawa to visit his dying father. However, an old rival of Miyagis is waiting for them, while Daniel is drawn into a vicious conflict with their enemys own karate protege. Martial arts sequel, starring Ralph Macchio, Pat Morita and Yuji Okumoto

programme.title: Risky Business (1983)
programme.desc: An upper-class suburban teenager gets involved with a prostitute while his parents are away on holiday, turning the family home into a brothel and jeopardising his plans for the future. Coming-of-age comedy, starring Tom Cruise, Rebecca De Mornay, Bronson Pinchot and Joe Pantoliano

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married (1986)
programme.desc: A depressed fortysomething woman about to get divorced faints at a high-school reunion and awakes to find she has travelled back in time to her teenage years. Comedy, starring Kathleen Turner, Nicolas Cage, Maureen OSullivan, Joan Allen, Catherine Hicks and Kevin J OConnor

Seeking someone else to help guide his career, he falls under the influence of a crooked trainer - who is secretly plotting his downfall with the help of an old adversary. Adventure sequel, starring Ralph Macchio and Pat Morita

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop (1984)
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berkoff

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II (1987)
programme.desc: Wisecracking Detroit detective Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles to investigate the shooting of an old friend, and uncovers a connection with a spate of violent robberies carried out by a criminal who leaves a mysterious calling card. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, John Ashton, Ronny Cox and Brigitte Nielsen.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon (1987)
programme.desc: An unstable Vietnam veteran cop teams up with a by-the-book Los Angeles police detective to investigate the apparent suicide of the daughter of a wealthy businessman, leading them to a violent and bloody confrontation with a ruthless drug cartel under the control of a retired US general. Action thriller, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Gary Busey, Mitchell Ryan and Tom Atkins

programme.title: Scarface (1983)
programme.desc: Small-time crook Tony Montana emigrates from Cuba to the US, determined to become rich and powerful. Admitted into the inner circle of a Miami drug lord, he ultimately takes over his bosss empire and even his wife. However, his paranoia and cocaine addiction begin to spiral out of control, while his enemies circle, waiting for the chance to bring him down. Gangster thriller remake, with Al Pacino, Michelle Pfeiffer and Robert Loggia

programme.title: Police Academy (1984)
programme.desc: An American police college lowers its entrance requirements in the hope of attracting new recruits, and in response, assorted dubious candidates turn up for enrolment. A short-tempered instructor is determined to weed out the bad apples, but a riot provides the clueless cops with a chance to prove their worth. Comedy, starring Steve Guttenberg, Kim Cattrall, Bubba Smith and GW Bailey

programme.title: Empire of the Sun (1987)
programme.desc: An English boy living in Shanghai is separated from his parents during the Japanese invasion and forced to live on the streets. The youngster is befriended by an American sailor, who helps the boy adapt to life without his family, before the pair are eventually captured and subjected to the terrors of internment. Steven Spielbergs Second World War drama based on JG Ballards semi-autobiographical novel, starring Christian Bale, John Malkovich and Nigel Havers

programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.title: Dont Lets Go to the Dogs Tonight (2025)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl experiences life on her familys Rhodesian farm during the final stages of the Bush War. Drama, written, directed by and starring Embeth Davidtz, with Lexi Ventner and Zikhona Bali

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - May 2026
programme.desc: A look ahead at the films to enjoy this month on Sky Cinema

programme.title: Blue Moon (2025)
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partners show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklaters biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott

programme.title: Eddington (2025)
programme.desc: A stand-off between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbours are pitted against each other in Eddington, New Mexico. Modern-day Western, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Emma Stone and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Roofman (2025)
programme.desc: Former US Army Reserve officer Jeffrey Manchester executes a plan to rob multiple branches of McDonalds. He is eventually captured by police and becomes the first person to escape from Brown Creek Correctional Institution in North Carolina. Jeffrey hides out at a toy shop for several months, and during forays outside the building, he sparks romance with store worker Leigh Wainscott. Comedy drama, starring Channing Tatum, Kirsten Dunst and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw acquires an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennells drama based on Emily Brontes romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Dont Lets Go to the Dogs Tonight (2025)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl experiences life on her familys Rhodesian farm during the final stages of the Bush War. Drama, written, directed by and starring Embeth Davidtz, with Lexi Ventner and Zikhona Bali

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues (2025)
programme.desc: Nigel Tufnel, David St Hubbins and Derek Smalls reunite after a 15-year break for one final concert. Their progress is charted once more by documentary maker Marti DiBergi, who offers perhaps too much perspective on their new direction. Comedy sequel, written by and starring Michael McKean, Harry Shearer, Christopher Guest and director Rob Reiner, in his final film. Kerry Godliman and Chris Addison also star with cameos by Paul McCartney, Elton John and Garth Brooks

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey (2025)
programme.desc: New York bachelor David is due to drive to his friends wedding, but a wheel clamp on his vehicle derails those plans. He acquires a new drive from the mysterious Car Rental Company managed by two nameless agents, who are oddly familiar with his dating history. At the wedding, David meets fellow singleton Sarah and squanders an opportunity to dance with her. On the way home, the rental cars GPS asks him if he would like to embark on a big bold beautiful journey. When David agrees, the virtual assistant guides him to Sarah and they follow a winding route between physical doors that open into episodes from their respective pasts. Romantic drama, starring Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw acquires an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennells drama based on Emily Brontes romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues (2025)
programme.desc: Nigel Tufnel, David St Hubbins and Derek Smalls reunite after a 15-year break for one final concert. Their progress is charted once more by documentary maker Marti DiBergi, who offers perhaps too much perspective on their new direction. Comedy sequel, written by and starring Michael McKean, Harry Shearer, Christopher Guest and director Rob Reiner, in his final film. Kerry Godliman and Chris Addison also star with cameos by Paul McCartney, Elton John and Garth Brooks

programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.title: Pillion (2025)
programme.desc: A directionless man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic biker takes him on as his submissive. Director Harry Lightons Bafta-nominated comedy, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Harry Melling and Douglas Hodge

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - May 2026
programme.desc: A look ahead at the films to enjoy this month on Sky Cinema

programme.title: Eddington (2025)
programme.desc: A stand-off between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbours are pitted against each other in Eddington, New Mexico. Modern-day Western, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Emma Stone and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Roofman (2025)
programme.desc: Former US Army Reserve officer Jeffrey Manchester executes a plan to rob multiple branches of McDonalds. He is eventually captured by police and becomes the first person to escape from Brown Creek Correctional Institution in North Carolina. Jeffrey hides out at a toy shop for several months, and during forays outside the building, he sparks romance with store worker Leigh Wainscott. Comedy drama, starring Channing Tatum, Kirsten Dunst and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey (2025)
programme.desc: New York bachelor David is due to drive to his friends wedding, but a wheel clamp on his vehicle derails those plans. He acquires a new drive from the mysterious Car Rental Company managed by two nameless agents, who are oddly familiar with his dating history. At the wedding, David meets fellow singleton Sarah and squanders an opportunity to dance with her. On the way home, the rental cars GPS asks him if he would like to embark on a big bold beautiful journey. When David agrees, the virtual assistant guides him to Sarah and they follow a winding route between physical doors that open into episodes from their respective pasts. Romantic drama, starring Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)

Mr Earnshaw acquires an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennells drama based on Emily Brontes romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Dont Lets Go to the Dogs Tonight (2025)
programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl experiences life on her familys Rhodesian farm during the final stages of the Bush War. Drama, written, directed by and starring Embeth Davidtz, with Lexi Ventner and Zikhona Bali

programme.title: Caught Stealing (2025)
programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: After the fall of France in 1940, Donitzs most famous U-boat commanders embarked on a race to send British merchant ships to the bottom of the sea. Driven by a fierce competition to sink the highest tonnage, they terrorised the North Atlantic convoys and converged on them in wolfpack attacks. All the while, Vera Laughton Mathews Wrens worked around the clock to bring the battle directly to Donitzs U-boats. When confronted with unprecedented losses, and the real risk of starvation, the British Royal Navy seized on a manoeuvre developed by the famous U-boat hunter, Commander Johnny F Walker. Narrated by Derek Jacobi

The team want to uncover the prisons lost structures, reveal the secrets of what went on behind its walls and discover just how secure and inescapable it really was

While Vera sought justice for her girls, a letter challenged her verdicts on Noor?s fate. Suspicions of double agents led Vera to hunt down a Nazi mastermind. programme.title: Hitlers Engineers

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The Vegas ladies discover that one of them has Texas flair. Kenny lucks out looking for lady stuff, while Mary gets the spring back in her step

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Egypts Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Despite being one of the most studied civilizations, rich in history, culture, science and art, much of Ancient Egypt remains a great mystery to this day. This series uses the latest science and cutting-edge technology to help experts solve some of Egypts most enduring mysteries that have tormented scientists for years. Here, science reveals new insights into belief and superstition in the land of the pharaohs, from finding the long-lost Land of Punt to Tutankhamun

programme.title: Egypts Unexplained Files
programme.desc: New technology is used to decode some of Egypts most enduring enigmas. The mysteries behind the ancient Egyptians obsession with death and the afterlife

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Dragons and Damsels
programme.desc: Arguably more beautiful than butterflies, better fliers than hummingbirds and with intriguing and complex behavioural patterns - dragonflies and damselflies are marvels of the insect kingdom. programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious (2003)
programme.desc: A disgraced former cop is arrested by the FBI for illegal street racing, but his one-time colleagues offer him freedom in exchange for going on an undercover mission. Teaming up with an old racing friend and a customs official, he has to infiltrate and bring down a drug-trafficking operation. Thriller sequel, with Paul Walker reprising his role from The Fast and the Furious alongside Tyrese Gibson, Eva Mendes and Cole Hauser

programme.title: Fast and Furious 8 (2017)
programme.desc: Street racing criminal Dominic Toretto is drawn out of retirement by an encounter with a ruthless cyberterrorist, who recruits him for an international criminal scheme. As he sets out to steal the technology she needs to unleash chaos on the world, he is drawn into conflict with both old enemies and his former gang. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Charlize Theron, Dwayne Johnson and Kurt Russell

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious (2001)
programme.desc: In a move to identify suspected hijackers, an undercover police officer infiltrates the high-octane world of illegal late-night street racing by rival gangs. He is befriended by a champion driver, but when he also forms a bond with the racers sister, he is pitched into a conflict of loyalties. Thriller, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious (2003)
programme.desc: A disgraced former cop is arrested by the FBI for illegal street racing, but his one-time colleagues offer him freedom in exchange for going on an undercover mission. Teaming up with an old racing friend and a customs official, he has to infiltrate and bring down a drug-trafficking operation. Thriller sequel, with Paul Walker reprising his role from The Fast and the Furious alongside Tyrese Gibson, Eva Mendes and Cole Hauser

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift (2006)
programme.desc: An American teenager is sent to live with his father in Tokyo after a brush with the law, but soon becomes involved in illegal street racing. When he ends up owing money to gangsters after losing a race against a driver with Yakuza connections, he has to learn to master the Japanese style of driving to win and pay back his debts. Action adventure, starring Lucas Black, Nathalie Kelley and Bow Wow

programme.title: Fast and Furious (2009)
programme.desc: News of a friends murder brings international fugitive Dominic Toretto back to his home city of Los Angeles in search of revenge. It is not long before his pursuit leads him to cross paths with FBI agent Brian OConner, and despite their hostile feelings toward each other, the pair work together to bring down those responsible. Thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: Fast and Furious 5 (2011)
programme.desc: Criminal Dominic Toretto is broken out of prison by his partners in crime and together they flee to South America. They begin assembling a gang of crooks to carry out a heist in Rio, but the FBIs top manhunter is in the country and hot on their trail. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Paul Walker and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: Fast and Furious 6 (2013)
programme.desc: A gang of fugitives is reunited by an FBI manhunter, who offers the criminals pardons in return for their help. They must go to Europe and bring down a criminal syndicate led by a ruthless London gangster, whose right-hand woman is an old friend of theirs assumed to be dead. Action thriller sequel, with Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson and Michelle Rodriguez

programme.title: Fast and Furious 7 (2015)
programme.desc: After defeating Owen Shaw and his crew and securing amnesty for their past crimes, Dom, Brian and the rest of the team return home to live normal lives again. However Shaws older brother Deckard - a rogue special forces assassin vows revenge on Dom, who he holds responsible for leaving Owen in a coma. Action thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Jason Statham and Paul Walker in his last film role

programme.title: Fast and Furious 8 (2017)

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With their security threatened, Rick and the group must make a choice. Woodbury has become a police state, making Andrea uneasy. Post-apocalyptic drama following the exploits of a former County Sheriff struggling to survive in the aftermath of a zombie epidemic. Starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: Fantasy Island
programme.desc: Ruby Akuda, who has a terminal illness, arrives with her husband and is given a new lease of life. Sequel to the 1970s drama, with Mr Roarkes grand niece Elena welcoming visitors to the exotic island where dreams become reality. Starring Roselyn Sanchez

programme.title: Fantasy Island
programme.desc: Two adventurers whose marriage has grown stale want to have the ultimate expedition together, while widower Brent must decide if he is ready to face his grief

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the group debates the next course of action, Rick wanders after a lost friend. Meanwhile, the Governor restores order in Woodbury and makes plans to punish those responsible. Post-apocalyptic drama following the exploits of a former County Sheriff struggling to survive in the aftermath of a zombie epidemic, starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate a series of mysterious deaths in which people simply exploded, and discover it may be the consequence of a centuries-long feud. Elsewhere, Monroe and Rosalee talk about moving their relationship a stage further. David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby star

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Part one of two. Yvette Fielding begin a 2007 investigation at the Transylvanian home of the notorious Vlad The Impaler Tepes, the man on whom the legend of Dracula was based. Originally broadcast live from Corvins Castle, the boyhood home of Vlad Tepes, the first night of the ghost-hunt sees the team searching the Transylvanian Room, Desert Tower and the Hanging Gallery

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard is put in charge of looking after Stephen Hawkings wheelchair when the famous scientist comes to lecture at the university for a week - and takes advantage of his position to blackmail Sheldon into performing assorted unpleasant tasks. Guest starring Stephen Hawking

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Raj organise a stag party for Howard, but stories about his sexual history are unwittingly revealed, and he has to persuade bride-to-be Bernadette not to call off the wedding. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard tries to use his wedding as an excuse to avoid being sent into space, but ends up accepting the mission. Amy plots to get Sheldon to take the next step in their relationship, while Leonard accidentally asks Penny to marry him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Howard and his fellow astronauts sit in the space shuttle awaiting launch, he reflects on the tumultuous events of the previous few days, when he and Bernadette tried to get married. Meanwhile, his friends witness the blast-off on TV at home

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Despite being on the International Space Station, Howard gets caught in a strange argument between Bernadette and his mother via video link. Elsewhere, Raj feels lonely while his best friend is away and ends up interfering with Sheldons and Leonards dates. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tells the girls she is unsure about her relationship with Leonard and is considering breaking up with him, but when Sheldon finds out, he tries his best to change her mind. Meanwhile, on the International Space Station, Howard is being bullied by the other astronauts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Comedy about a Chicago couple: easy-going police officer Mike Biggs and likeable teacher Molly Flynn, who must somehow find their own little haven of happiness among their chaotic, ever-present friends and family. In this pilot episode, Molly is impressed by Mikes contribution at an Overeaters Anonymous meeting. Instantly smitten, she invites him to come and speak to the pupils in her class. Starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Mike decides to impress Molly by taking her bowling, but when she beats him at the game, speaks German and recites poetry, he begins to worry that she is too clever for him

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: The couples relationship takes an unexpected turn when Molly invites Mike into her home after their third date, but he turns her down. Starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: David, Goliath and a Yoo-Hoo from the Back
programme.desc: The prodigy uses his new friendship with school bully Tommy Clarkson to boss Georgie around. Missy steals Meemaws make-up to wear when her photograph is taken on school picture day

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Math Emergency and Perky Palms
programme.desc: The young genius and Dr Sturgis fall out for the first time when Dr Sturgis marks a question as wrong on Sheldons test paper. Meanwhile, Mary takes over Pastor Jeffs duties when hes off sick

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Loaf of Bread and a Grand Old Flag
programme.desc: The youngster boycotts his favourite bread company when the taste of his favourite loaf changes, but matters soon get out of control. Meanwhile, Georgie tries to console Veronica after breaking up with her boyfriend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon hires an attractive female assistant, but when she becomes interested in Leonard, Penny decides to mark her territory by sleeping with him. Meanwhile, Howard starts to lose his mind when his return from space is delayed another week. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard returns from his space mission, but the welcome from his friends and family does not meet his expectations. His night alone with Bernadette goes badly, his mother ignores him, and he realises Stuart has taken his place as Rajs best friend. On top of that, Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny kick him out of their group games night. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Stuart hosts a Halloween party at the comic-book store, and Howard talks incessantly about his work on board the International Space Station, annoying his wife and friends. Penny and Leonard have a steamy encounter at the lab. Guest starring real-life astronaut Buzz Aldrin

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon upsets guest star Stephen Hawking when they play an online game of Words with Friends, until Howard advises him to let the scientist win. Elsewhere, Penny enrols in a college class, but decides to keep it a secret from Leonard. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Amy and Wil Wheaton get into a fight while filming Fun with Flags, Sheldon suffers the consequences of their fall-out. He ends up going to Penny for advice and after getting drunk, confronts the actor in a bid to make him apologise. Bernadette encourages Howard to move out of his mothers house

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends try to solve the mystery of Sheldons post-lunch activities, following him to a secret room where they discover how he chills out. Elsewhere, Leonard is jealous when Penny starts texting a classmate, but things quickly change when Alex gets flirty with him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels undermined when his parking space at the university is allocated to Howard instead, and his determination to cling on to the spot causes a rift in the pairs friendship. However, the battle between the boys pales in comparison to that waged by Amy and Bernadette, whose disagreement on behalf of their significant others becomes increasingly personal. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As part of the relationship agreement, Sheldon reluctantly has to take care of Amy when she gets sick, but she loves the extra attention so much she pretends to remain in poor health. Elsewhere, Howard tries to get some tips on manliness from Penny when he and Bernadette go to visit her father

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper: Breaking Out

Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is furious when the university forces him to work with Kripke, while Howards hobby lands him in financial trouble. However, that doesnt stop him and Raj getting expensive action figures of themselves made - much to Bernadettes disapproval

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and his team of experts, Katie Rushworth, Frances Tophill and David Domoney, creates a modern family garden in Hucknall near Nottingham. The project is a surprise for a landscape gardener who was diagnosed with Alzheimers at the age of just 32, making him one of the youngest people in the country to develop the condition and leaving him physically unable to complete the garden personally. Alan also provides viewers with some tips on sensory planting and creating home-made play equipment for children

programme.desc: Donal MacIntyre meets Detective Chief Superintendent Kate Meynell to discover how she solved the murder of 50-year-old Nigel Bacon from Clumber Park, Nottinghamshire.

programme.title: Britains Almost Perfect Murders
programme.desc: The story of what happened when five people died at White House Farm. Jeremy Bamber framed his sister for the murders, but silencer forensics were his undoing.

programme.title: Murder UK
programme.desc: The story of nurse Victorino Chua, who betrayed his oath by secretly poisoning hospital patients in Greater Manchester by contaminating saline drips with lethal insulin.

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: The story of a man who had to save his friend from a great white shark attack, when they were body boarding off an Australian beach.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The amateur sleuth struggles to protect those closest to him when an old foe is unexpectedly released from prison. Mark Williams stars

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Goodman is called in to investigate the death of former surgeon Emma Redding at a retirement home. With an empty packet of sleeping pills beside her body and her room locked from the inside, it looks like an open-and-shut case of suicide. However, the team discovers everything is not as it seems and mounting evidence suggests she may in fact have been poisoned. Then, a blast from Humphreys past arrives unexpectedly on the island, and looks set to distract him from solving the case. Guest starring Rupert Vansittart, Joanna David, Phil Davis and Michele Dotrice

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: After a counterfeit money operation is busted, Charlie interrogates criminal kingpin Rupert Mankiewicz for leads during his prison transfer

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch attends a party thrown by a prominent scientist, who collapses and dies. Later, the body goes missing and a note suggests he may have faked his death.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When Murdoch and Crabtree participate in a battlefield re-enactment, one of the participating soldiers is murdered

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The amateur sleuth struggles to protect those closest to him when an old foe is unexpectedly released from prison. Mark Williams stars

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The agents suspect a hitman is responsible for the recent murder of an Assistant District Attorney, leading Van Pelt to pose as a potential client to meet him. The killer is arrested and taken to court, but Janes unorthodox methods cause the trial to fall apart. Suspended from duty, he takes matters into his own hands and discovers who hired the murderer, but puts his and Lisbons lives in danger. Crime drama, starring Amanda Righetti and Simon Baker

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: When Sarahs former professor is seemingly framed for murder, Sarah calls Charlie and Rex to untangle the perfect crime

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a gym owner and his anaesthesiologist wife, and discovers the couples frightened son, hiding in the house. Carrie uses her own childhood trauma to connect with the boy - the only person who can identify his parents killers - but faces opposition from a psychologist

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A plantation owner ends up dead during a seance - although with the door firmly closed at the time and all the participants holding hands round the table, who did the deed? The victims family are convinced it was the work of a ghost said to haunt the plantation, but Humphrey is determined to find a more rational explanation. Meanwhile, Fidel has moved on, leaving Officer Dwayne Myers holding the fort - and while he is struggling to cope, the last thing he needs is the Commissioner stepping in to help. Crime drama, with guest appearances from Holby Citys Don Gilet and former Corrie bad girl Natalie Gumede

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Jane finds a new adversary in cult leader Bret Stiles, who arouses suspicion when a media mogul who may have questioned his groups activities is found dead. As the team searches for clues, the victims father receives an anonymous text message warning that a bomb is about to detonate in the building. Crime drama, guest starring Malcolm McDowell (A Clockwork Orange)

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead in the snow, Charlie and Rex have a pool of unconnected suspects with one thing in common - the victim was convinced they were all her family

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: A hotel maid accused of killing a guest tells the detectives that she was fighting off an attacker who was trying to rape her. Carrie takes the on the case in a bid to find out the truth of it. However at the same time, it could be troublesome for the matter Al is investigating, as a series of intricately connected blackmail schemes is revealed. Poppy Montgomey stars

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team dives into the case of surf-school owner Jake Peters murder. The victim was shot in his workshop and Humphrey suspects there is more to the incident than meets the eye when he spots the door was locked from the inside with no other obvious means of entry. Suspicion falls on three pupils who have their own agendas, while grieving wife Katie and best friend Karl Slater are harbouring dark secrets. Away from the workplace, Humphrey continues to struggle with his feelings for Camille and decides to take matters into his own hands when faced with competition for her affections. Caribbean-set detective drama, with guest appearances from Hetti Bywater, Claire Goose and Will Mellor

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A popular reggae band reunite after 30 years to perform on Saint Marie, but the joyous occasion is blighted when guitarist Billy Springer is found dead in his dressing room afterwards. With a gun in his hand and the door locked from the inside, all evidence points toward suicide - but when the Commissioner reveals he received a message from the victim earlier in the day, the case becomes rather more complicated. Meanwhile, Dwayne struggles to come to terms with his dads surprise visit. Is it too late for them to make amends? With guest appearances by Ram John Holder, Suzanne Packer, Delroy Brown and Levi Roots

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The Saint Marie Heritage Society is re-enacting the French invasion of the island when its president dies. At first it looks like an extreme reaction to a dodgy stew as the rest of the group have fallen ill - but when lab reports reveal there was poison in the pot, Humphrey is left wondering why the victim was the only one to end up in the mortuary. Meanwhile, Dwayne takes Humphrey out on the town to show him his own way of celebrating the founding of Saint Marie, and the DI continues to struggle with his feelings for Camille. Caribbean whodunit, guest starring David Bamber and Tyger Drew-Honey

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Dara O Briain and Hugh Dennis front a special edition of the topical comedy show featuring best bits and unseen material from the series

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Countdown dictionary expert Susie Dent, comedian Bob Mortimer and TV presenters Ore Oduba and Stacey Solomon join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show in which participants attempt to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Hosted by Rob Brydon

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which two teams headed by David Mitchell and Lee Mack try to hoodwink each other with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Micky Flanagan, Fiona Bruce, Claudia Winkleman and Steve Jones are first up, with stories including performing a striptease at a lacklustre hen party and saving P Diddy from drowning

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig presents a volatile episode of QI with Aisling Bea, Mark Watson, Michelle Wolf and Alan Davies

programme.title: Frankie Boyles New World Order
programme.desc: The comedian tries to make sense of the modern world, using a combination of stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction to dissect the weeks news - with a panel of guests on hand to take Frankie to task over his claims

programme.title: Gadget Man
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade showcases gadgets that highlight the benefits of staying home. Comedian Seann Walsh joins him to check out designs that deliver the health benefits of the great outdoors without the dirt and danger leaving the house can include. Richard then enjoys the company of mechanised pets before inviting comedian David Mitchell round to try out the latest gaming technologies. Lastly, he demonstrates live holographic broadcast technology that allows the host to party without the need for guests to attend, proving that leaving the home could be a thing of the past

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Methamphetamine is found in a shipment of broccoli, an elderly man tries to smuggle pills in protein powder, and a woman receives a humanitarian visa to see her dying son

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Money and guns belonging to a cartel are found in a car, an illegal shipment of exotic reptiles is discovered in a van, and a man is caught smuggling medication

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: The team is given two days and a $20,000 budget to remove a 10-metre steel-hulled yacht from Cockburn Beach in Western Australia. The problem is the boat is buried deep in the sand and is a danger to beach goers. Heavy machinery specialist Ryan is going to use his monster excavator to try and get the job done, but theres a catch - to make the budget work, Luke needs Ryan to be done and dusted in 24 hours.

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick visits Europes largest tea plantation, on the banks of the River Fal, bakes a simple yet sumptuous fruited tea loaf and travels to Penzance, where he enjoys an invigorating dip in the UKs largest outdoor seawater lido. He also finds out how Cornwall inspired Charles Dickens and how the county found its way into A Christmas Carol

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: The chef glimpses life in Cornwall 2,000 years ago as he explores the atmospheric ruins of the ancient village of Carn Euny. Rick also cooks his favourite Sunday lunch, a hearty steak and kidney pudding, and goes for a bracing ride on a beautiful hand-built boat

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which two teams headed by David Mitchell and Lee Mack try to hoodwink each other with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. programme.title: The Hairy Bikers: Mums Know Best

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show from 2016, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by Richard Osman, Tom Courtenay, Sara Pascoe and Chris Kamara. As usual, all participants will be hoping to deceive one another with plausible lies, such as Richard stating he has never seen Breaking Bad because of his Homes Under the Hammer addiction, Sir Tom claiming he enjoys whiskey on his Christmas morning cornflakes, and Chris explaining that his full name is actually Christmas Kamara. The team also presents a somewhat unusual take on the Nativity

Bake Off presenter Mel Giedroyc, comedian Bob Mortimer, Citizen Khan star Adil Ray and Westlife singer Kian Egan are this weeks guests, whose stories include licking David Bowies cake and being ordered to leave town by the police

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show from 2016, in which team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by Richard Osman, Tom Courtenay, Sara Pascoe and Chris Kamara. As usual, all participants will be hoping to deceive one another with plausible lies, such as Richard stating he has never seen Breaking Bad because of his Homes Under the Hammer addiction, Sir Tom claiming he enjoys whiskey on his Christmas morning cornflakes, and Chris explaining that his full name is actually Christmas Kamara. The team also presents a somewhat unusual take on the Nativity

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Former winners Dr Maggie Aderin-Pocock, Cariad Lloyd, Gareth Malone and Mike Wozniak test their general knowledge skills ahead of Fridays final

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Cally Beaton, Nish Kumar and Laura Smyth join regular panellist Alan Davies on the comedy quiz, with host Sandi Toksvig asking questions on the theme of visionaries

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong hosts an extended episode of the satirical current affairs quiz. Team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton are joined by guests Steph McGovern and Phil Wang

programme.title: Frankie Boyles New World Order
programme.desc: The comedian tries to make sense of the modern world, using a combination of stand-up, review, discussion and audience interaction to dissect the weeks news - with a panel of guests on hand to take Frankie to task over his claims

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Angela Barnes, Ed Gamble, London Hughes, Rhys James and Milton Jones join regular panellist Hugh Dennis on the comedy quiz show, hosted by Dara O Briain. Yet again, stand-up and improvisation are the name of the game as the contestants try to get one up on each other

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show in which the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory. Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the Christmas fun are former Test Match Special commentator Henry Blofeld, Witless star Kerry Howard, broadcaster the Rev Richard Coles and BBC News presenter Clive Myrie. They all reveal amazing stories, but are they telling the truth, or making it all up?

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which two teams headed by David Mitchell and Lee Mack try to hoodwink each other with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Bake Off presenter Mel Giedroyc, comedian Bob Mortimer, Citizen Khan star Adil Ray and Westlife singer Kian Egan are this weeks guests, whose stories include licking David Bowies cake and being ordered to leave town by the police

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Rhod Gilbert, Ignacio Lopez and Zoe Lyons join regular panellist Alan Davies on the comedy quiz, with host Sandi Toksvig asking questions on the theme of viral

programme.title: Frankie Boyles New World Order
programme.desc: The comedian returns with the programme in which he tries to make sense of the modern world. Frankie tackles the biggest issues troubling the planet, making a string of bold and often outrageous statements which he then picks apart with the help of a variety of celebrity guests

programme.title: Gadget Man
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade confronts the horror of cooking and dining out as he attempts to create his very own utopian eatery, consulting leading food scientists and checking out gadgets more at home in a laboratory than a kitchen. He invites guest Adrian Edmondson to join him at his unique bistro, complete with printed food, robot waiters, computerised wine sniffers, zero-calorie electronic starters, levitating desserts and transparent coffee

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: A forgetful clock-mender contacts the sleuth when he becomes the target of a couple of small-time crooks. Armed with advice from DCI Adams, Hetty starts her investigation at a video store and soon discovers that there is more to the case than meets the eye

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: When a local nun is strangled to death on her way to the chapel, the team find investigating the murder to be a real challenge after they learn that the members of her order have taken a vow of silence

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Holmes follows a case of suspected money laundering, while Beechs shady past comes back to haunt him when a former girlfriend is hit by a car

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Ronnie persuades a TV reporter friend to confess to telling a lie which shocked the whole of Letherbridge. George hopes for a big surprise on her 40th birthday, but things are not as she expects. Joe is furious when the police arrive looking for Kay - who has given them his address

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: A man worries about his pregnant and formerly anorexic wife, but the woman tells Melody it is her husband who has the problem. Ronnie invites everyone to Georges fancy dress party and accidentally tells Mal what Julia has been through with Mac and Leo. Joe tells Daniel hes been offered a job at Harvard, and Kay is arrested

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Jess tells Zubin she is pregnant and moving in with Sean, but is stunned by his reaction, while Tricia is haunted by her failed marriage in the wake of Maggies death. Mickies date with Mubbs doesnt go as well as either of them hoped and she decides to face reality, confessing to Will she is gay but urging him to keep it a secret. The Crouches Mona Hammond guest stars

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Adam is tempted to bypass normal hospital procedure to help a known sex offender who is admitted to the ED after suffering a beating at the hands of a victims father. Meanwhile, Mads is distraught to learn her new friend is the wife of her attacker Ash, and Linda goes head to head with Jordan over budgets, only to find unlikely assistance in the form of his PA. Guest starring Loose Women panellist Denise Welch, with Tristan Gemmill and Hasina Haque

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Holmes follows a case of suspected money laundering, while Beechs shady past comes back to haunt him when a former girlfriend is hit by a car

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Lucas completely loses control with Denise, with potentially devastating consequences

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Ian sees a different side to Phil as he tries to do his best for Ben

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.desc: Recently retired English professor Harriet Harry Wild is trying to adjust to retirement when shes injured in a mugging. While recovering at the home of her police detective son Charlie, she looks at his files and realises his latest investigation bears similarities to an obscure Elizabethan play. But when her findings are rebuffed, she decides to find the killer-with aid from a surprising source. Drama, starring Jane Seymour

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: Ballarat Hospitals only female doctor is found hanged at the premises in an apparent suicide. However, Blake suspects foul play and investigates some potential suspects, including chief surgeon Geoffrey Nicholson, a close friend of town bigwig Patrick Tyneman. Blakes antipathy toward both men leads him to some seemingly obvious conclusions - but he runs the risk of going too far

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: Now that Hetty and her husband are back from their trip to Australia, the Wainthropp Detective Agency can get back to some serious sleuthing. However, the first case to crop up is far from typical - it involves hunting for buried treasure in the wilds of Cumbria. Patricia Routledge stars as the modern-day Miss Marple, with Derek Benfield, Dominic Monaghan and Lesley Dunlop

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Doriens life story looks set to be published, prompting her to panic about the kiss-and-tell content - can Sharon and Tracey come to her aid? Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Seymour departs for a new teaching job, leaving Clegg and Compo at a loose end now he is no longer around to drag them into his eccentric schemes. However, they do not realise an old friend is about to return to the village. Comedy, starring Peter Sallis, Bill Owen and Brian Wilde

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy makes an ill-advised attempt to establish long-distance communication with Compo and Clegg by investing in some walkie-talkies. However, it doesnt take long for one of the units to fall foul of a tractor. Long-running rural comedy, with Brian Wilde, Peter Sallis and Bill Owen

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Compo, Clegg and Foggy are intrigued by some perfectly respectable men who turn up without their trousers, before they take part in an event sponsored by a village charity

programme.title: This Is Not a Murder Mystery
programme.desc: As the artists begin to suspect one another, Scotland Yards investigation starts to focus on a single guest. Paranoia spreads, secrets unravel and new facts come to light

programme.title: The Chelsea Detective
programme.sub-title: The Wages of Sin - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. When a stonemason is pushed under a London Underground train, DI Max Arnold and his partner DS Priya Shamsie investigate. Crime drama starring Adrian Scarborough

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The former leader of an Irish Republican group comes forward with information regarding the abduction and subsequent disappearance of an 18-year-old woman in 1983, prompting the team to reopen the case. The reformed dissident claims the rebels used the kidnapping to raise their profile, but his subsequent reinvention as a politician and man of peace leaves Sandra and her colleagues suspicious of his motives. They also investigate whether the arms-manufacturing activities of the victims father could have made her a target. Crime drama, guest starring Sian Phillips and Annette Crosbie, with Amanda Redman and James Bolam

programme.title: Dalziel and Pascoe
programme.desc: The duo investigate the murder of a high-profile judge in the midst of a prominent drugs trial, but Pascoe is distracted by an important personal decision which, for once, his partner cannot help him with. Crime drama, starring Warren Clarke and Colin Buchanan

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: Now that Hetty and her husband are back from their trip to Australia, the Wainthropp Detective Agency can get back to some serious sleuthing. However, the first case to crop up is far from typical - it involves hunting for buried treasure in the wilds of Cumbria. Patricia Routledge stars as the modern-day Miss Marple, with Derek Benfield, Dominic Monaghan and Lesley Dunlop

programme.title: This Is Not a Murder Mystery
programme.desc: Crime drama set in the 1930s. Surrealist artists, including Rene Magritte and Salvador Dali, gather for an exhibition. When a murder occurs, the estate is locked down
